title: Improved Object Pose Estimation via Deep Pre-touch Sensing
title_zh: 通过深度预触摸传感改进物体姿态估计
abstract: For certain manipulation tasks, object pose estimation from head-mounted cameras may not be sufficiently accurate. This is at least in part due to our inability to perfectly calibrate the coordinate frames of today's high degree of freedom robot arms that link the head to the end-effectors. We present a novel framework combining pre-touch sensing and deep learning to more accurately estimate pose in an efficient manner. The use of pre-touch sensing allows our method to localize the object directly with respect to the robot's end effector, thereby avoiding error caused by miscalibration of the arms. Instead of requiring the robot to scan the entire object with its pre-touch sensor, we use a deep neural network to detect object regions that contain distinctive geometric features. By focusing pre-touch sensing on these regions, the robot can more efficiently gather the information necessary to adjust its original pose estimate. Our region detection network was trained using a new dataset containing objects of widely varying geometries and has been labeled in a scalable fashion that is free from human bias. This dataset is applicable to any task that involves a pre-touch sensor gathering geometric information, and has been made publicly available. We evaluate our framework by having the robot re-estimate the pose of a number of objects of varying geometries. Compared to two simpler region proposal methods, we find that our deep neural network performs significantly better. In addition, we find that after a sequence of scans, objects can typically be localized to within 0.5 cm of their true position. We also observe that the original pose estimate can often be significantly improved after collecting a single quick scan.

This is at least in part due to our inability to perfectly calibrate the coordinate frames of today's high degree of freedom robot arms that link the head to the end-effectors. Instead of requiring the robot to scan the entire object with its pre-touch sensor, we use a deep neural network to detect object regions that contain distinctive geometric features. By focusing pre-touch sensing on these regions, the robot can more efficiently gather the information necessary to adjust its original pose estimate. Our region detection network was trained using a new dataset containing objects of widely varying geometries and has been labeled in a scalable fashion that is free from human bias. This dataset is applicable to any task that involves a pre-touch sensor gathering geometric information, and has been made publicly available. We evaluate our framework by having the robot re-estimate the pose of a number of objects of varying geometries. Compared to two simpler region proposal methods, we find that our deep neural network performs significantly better. abstract_zh: 对于某些操作任务，头戴式摄像头的物体姿态估计可能不够准确。这至少部分是由于我们无法完美校准当今连接头部和末端执行器的高自由度机器人手臂的坐标系。我们提出了一种结合预触摸传感和深度学习的新颖框架，以有效的方式更准确地估计姿势。使用预触摸传感使我们的方法能够直接相对于机器人末端执行器定位物体，从而避免由于手臂校准不当而导致的误差。我们不需要机器人使用其预触摸传感器扫描整个物体，而是使用深度神经网络来检测包含独特几何特征的物体区域。通过将预触摸感应集中在这些区域，机器人可以更有效地收集调整其原始姿态估计所需的信息。我们的区域检测网络使用包含各种几何形状的对象的新数据集进行训练，并以不受人类偏见影响的可扩展方式进行标记。该数据集适用于任何涉及预触摸传感器收集几何信息的任务，并且已公开发布。我们通过让机器人重新估计多个不同几何形状的物体的姿态来评估我们的框架。与两种更简单的区域提议方法相比，我们发现我们的深度神经网络表现明显更好。此外，我们发现经过一系列扫描后，物体通常可以定位到其真实位置的 0.5 厘米以内。我们还观察到，在收集一次快速扫描后，原始姿态估计通常可以得到显着改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合预触觉传感与深度学习的框架，通过减少机械臂校准误差提升物体位姿估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于头戴摄像头的位姿估计受机械臂坐标系校准误差影响较大，传统扫描方法效率低下且存在偏差。
AI.method: 利用深度神经网络检测物体显著几何特征区域，定向触发预触觉传感扫描，减少冗余数据采集并构建可扩展数据集。
AI.result: 定位精度达0.5厘米级，单次扫描即可显著优化初始估计，优于传统区域提案方法且数据集适用于多种几何物体。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过智能感知区域选择有效提升位姿估计效率与精度，公开数据集为相关研究提供基础支持。

authors_text: Ramon Fraga Pereira,André G. Pereira,Frederico Messa,Giuseppe De Giacomo
title: Iterative Depth-First Search for Fully Observable Non-Deterministic Planning
title_zh: 完全可观察的非确定性规划的迭代深度优先搜索
abstract: Fully Observable Non-Deterministic (FOND) planning models uncertainty through actions with non-deterministic effects. Existing FOND planning algorithms are effective and employ a wide range of techniques. However, most of the existing algorithms are not robust for dealing with both non-determinism and task size. In this paper, we develop a novel iterative depth-first search algorithm that solves FOND planning tasks and produces strong cyclic policies. Our algorithm is explicitly designed for FOND planning, addressing more directly the non-deterministic aspect of FOND planning, and it also exploits the benefits of heuristic functions to make the algorithm more effective during the iterative searching process. We compare our proposed algorithm to well-known FOND planners, and show that it has robust performance over several distinct types of FOND domains considering different metrics.
summary: Fully Observable Non-Deterministic (FOND) planning models uncertainty through actions with non-deterministic effects. Existing FOND planning algorithms are effective and employ a wide range of techniques. However, most of the existing algorithms are not robust for dealing with both non-determinism and task size. In this paper, we develop a novel iterative depth-first search algorithm that solves FOND planning tasks and produces strong cyclic policies. Our algorithm is explicitly designed for FOND planning, addressing more directly the non-deterministic aspect of FOND planning, and it also exploits the benefits of heuristic functions to make the algorithm more effective during the iterative searching process. We compare our proposed algorithm to well-known FOND planners, and show that it has robust performance over several distinct types of FOND domains considering different metrics.
abstract_zh: 完全可观察的非确定性 (FOND) 规划通过具有非确定性影响的行动来模拟不确定性。现有的 FOND 规划算法非常有效，并且采用了多种技术。然而，大多数现有算法对于处理非确定性和任务大小并不鲁棒。在本文中，我们开发了一种新颖的迭代深度优先搜索算法，可以解决 FOND 规划任务并产生强循环策略。我们的算法是专门为 FOND 规划而设计的，更直接地解决 FOND 规划的非确定性方面，并且它还利用启发式函数的优势，使算法在迭代搜索过程中更加有效。我们将我们提出的算法与著名的 FOND 规划器进行比较，并表明考虑到不同的指标，它在几种不同类型的 FOND 域上具有鲁棒的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种迭代深度优先搜索算法，用于解决完全可观测非确定性（FOND）规划问题，并生成强循环策略。
AI.motivation: 现有FOND规划算法在处理非确定性和任务规模时不够稳健，需设计更直接应对非确定性的算法并结合启发式函数提升效率。
AI.method: 开发了专为FOND规划设计的迭代深度优先搜索算法，结合启发式函数优化迭代搜索过程，生成强循环策略。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在多种FOND领域和不同指标下均表现出优于现有规划器的鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: 新算法通过显式处理非确定性及启发式引导，在FOND规划任务中实现了高效且稳健的求解效果。

title: Grounding Hindsight Instructions in Multi-Goal Reinforcement Learning for Robotics
title_zh: 机器人多目标强化学习中的后见之明指导
comment: Published at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL)
comments: Published at the 2022 IEEE International Conference on Development and Learning (ICDL)
abstract: This paper focuses on robotic reinforcement learning with sparse rewards for natural language goal representations. An open problem is the sample-inefficiency that stems from the compositionality of natural language, and from the grounding of language in sensory data and actions. We address these issues with three contributions. We first present a mechanism for hindsight instruction replay utilizing expert feedback. Second, we propose a seq2seq model to generate linguistic hindsight instructions. Finally, we present a novel class of language-focused learning tasks. We show that hindsight instructions improve the learning performance, as expected. In addition, we also provide an unexpected result: We show that the learning performance of our agent can be improved by one third if, in a sense, the agent learns to talk to itself in a self-supervised manner. We achieve this by learning to generate linguistic instructions that would have been appropriate as a natural language goal for an originally unintended behavior. Our results indicate that the performance gain increases with the task-complexity.
summary: This paper focuses on robotic reinforcement learning with sparse rewards for natural language goal representations. An open problem is the sample-inefficiency that stems from the compositionality of natural language, and from the grounding of language in sensory data and actions. We address these issues with three contributions. We first present a mechanism for hindsight instruction replay utilizing expert feedback. Second, we propose a seq2seq model to generate linguistic hindsight instructions. Finally, we present a novel class of language-focused learning tasks. We show that hindsight instructions improve the learning performance, as expected. In addition, we also provide an unexpected result: We show that the learning performance of our agent can be improved by one third if, in a sense, the agent learns to talk to itself in a self-supervised manner. We achieve this by learning to generate linguistic instructions that would have been appropriate as a natural language goal for an originally unintended behavior. Our results indicate that the performance gain increases with the task-complexity.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注自然语言目标表示的稀疏奖励的机器人强化学习。一个悬而未决的问题是样本效率低下，它源于自然语言的组合性，以及语言基于感官数据和动作的基础。我们通过三项贡献来解决这些问题。我们首先提出一种利用专家反馈进行事后指令重播的机制。其次，我们提出了一个 seq2seq 模型来生成语言后见之明指令。最后，我们提出了一类新颖的以语言为中心的学习任务。我们表明，事后指导可以提高学习成绩，正如预期的那样。此外，我们还提供了一个意想不到的结果：我们表明，如果代理在某种意义上学会以自我监督的方式与自己对话，那么代理的学习性能可以提高三分之一。我们通过学习生成语言指令来实现这一目标，这些指令适合作为最初无意行为的自然语言目标。我们的结果表明，性能增益随着任务复杂性的增加而增加。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过多目标强化学习结合自然语言目标表示的机器人学习方法，利用 hindsight 指令和自监督学习提升样本效率。
AI.motivation: 自然语言目标在机器人强化学习中因语言组合性和感知-动作 grounding 的复杂性，导致样本效率低下，亟需解决这一问题。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1) 利用专家反馈的 hindsight 指令重放机制；2) 基于 seq2seq 的语言 hindsight 指令生成模型；3) 新型语言导向学习任务，并引入自监督的‘自我对话’策略生成非预期行为的自然语言目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，hindsight 指令提升学习性能，且自监督的‘自我对话’策略使性能提升三分之一，且任务复杂度越高增益越显著。
AI.conclusion: 通过 grounding 自然语言与动作感知，结合 hindsight 指令和自监督学习，可显著提升机器人多目标强化学习的样本效率与复杂任务表现。

search_text: Grounding Hindsight Instructions in Multi-Goal Reinforcement Learning for Robotics 机器人多目标强化学习中的后见之明指导 This paper focuses on robotic reinforcement learning with sparse rewards for natural language goal representations. An open problem is the sample-inefficiency that stems from the compositionality of natural language, and from the grounding of language in sensory data and actions. We address these issues with three contributions. We first present a mechanism for hindsight instruction replay utilizing expert feedback. Second, we propose a seq2seq model to generate linguistic hindsight instructions. Finally, we present a novel class of language-focused learning tasks. We show that hindsight instructions improve the learning performance, as expected. In addition, we also provide an unexpected result: We show that the learning performance of our agent can be improved by one third if, in a sense, the agent learns to talk to itself in a self-supervised manner. We achieve this by learning to generate linguistic instructions that would have been appropriate as a natural language goal for an originally unintended behavior. Our results indicate that the performance gain increases with the task-complexity. 本文重点关注自然语言目标表示的稀疏奖励的机器人强化学习。一个悬而未决的问题是样本效率低下，它源于自然语言的组合性，以及语言基于感官数据和动作的基础。我们通过三项贡献来解决这些问题。我们首先提出一种利用专家反馈进行事后指令重播的机制。其次，我们提出了一个 seq2seq 模型来生成语言后见之明指令。最后，我们提出了一类新颖的以语言为中心的学习任务。我们表明，事后指导可以提高学习成绩，正如预期的那样。此外，我们还提供了一个意想不到的结果：我们表明，如果代理在某种意义上学会以自我监督的方式与自己对话，那么代理的学习性能可以提高三分之一。我们通过学习生成语言指令来实现这一目标，这些指令适合作为最初无意行为的自然语言目标。我们的结果表明，性能增益随着任务复杂性的增加而增加。 本文提出了一种通过多目标强化学习结合自然语言目标表示的机器人学习方法，利用 hindsight 指令和自监督学习提升样本效率。 Frank Röder,Manfred Eppe,Stefan Wermter cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Chris C. Emezue,Bonaventure F. P. Dossou
title: MMTAfrica: Multilingual Machine Translation for African Languages
title_zh: MMTAfrica：非洲语言多语言机器翻译
abstract: In this paper, we focus on the task of multilingual machine translation for African languages and describe our contribution in the 2021 WMT Shared Task: Large-Scale Multilingual Machine Translation. We introduce MMTAfrica, the first many-to-many multilingual translation system for six African languages: Fon (fon), Igbo (ibo), Kinyarwanda (kin), Swahili/Kiswahili (swa), Xhosa (xho), and Yoruba (yor) and two non-African languages: English (eng) and French (fra). For multilingual translation concerning African languages, we introduce a novel backtranslation and reconstruction objective, BT\&REC, inspired by the random online back translation and T5 modeling framework respectively, to effectively leverage monolingual data. Additionally, we report improvements from MMTAfrica over the FLORES 101 benchmarks (spBLEU gains ranging from $+0.58$ in Swahili to French to $+19.46$ in French to Xhosa). We release our dataset and code source at https://github.com/edaiofficial/mmtafrica.
summary: In this paper, we focus on the task of multilingual machine translation for African languages and describe our contribution in the 2021 WMT Shared Task: Large-Scale Multilingual Machine Translation. We introduce MMTAfrica, the first many-to-many multilingual translation system for six African languages: Fon (fon), Igbo (ibo), Kinyarwanda (kin), Swahili/Kiswahili (swa), Xhosa (xho), and Yoruba (yor) and two non-African languages: English (eng) and French (fra). For multilingual translation concerning African languages, we introduce a novel backtranslation and reconstruction objective, BT\&REC, inspired by the random online back translation and T5 modeling framework respectively, to effectively leverage monolingual data. Additionally, we report improvements from MMTAfrica over the FLORES 101 benchmarks (spBLEU gains ranging from $+0.58$ in Swahili to French to $+19.46$ in French to Xhosa). We release our dataset and code source at https://github.com/edaiofficial/mmtafrica.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们重点关注非洲语言的多语言机器翻译任务，并描述了我们在 2021 年 WMT 共享任务：大规模多语言机器翻译中的贡献。我们推出 MMTAfrica，这是第一个多对多多语言翻译系统，适用于六种非洲语言：丰语 (fon)、伊博语 (ibo)、基尼亚卢旺达语 (kin)、斯瓦希里语/斯瓦希里语 (swa)、科萨语 (xho) 和约鲁巴语 (yor) 以及两种非非洲语言：英语 (eng) 和法语 (fra)。对于涉及非洲语言的多语言翻译，我们分别引入了一种新颖的反向翻译和重建目标 BT\&REC，分别受到随机在线反向翻译和 T5 建模框架的启发，以有效地利用单语言数据。此外，我们还报告了 MMTAfrica 相对于 FLORES 101 基准的改进（spBLEU 收益范围从斯瓦希里语到法语的 +0.58 美元到法语到科萨语的 +19.46 美元）。我们在 https://github.com/edaiofficial/mmtafrica 发布了我们的数据集和代码源。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了MMTAfrica，首个支持六种非洲语言及英法两种语言的多对多多语言机器翻译系统。
AI.motivation: 非洲语言资源稀缺且翻译系统效果有限，需探索有效利用单语数据的新方法以提升翻译质量。
AI.method: 提出BT&REC目标函数，结合随机在线反向翻译与T5框架，通过单语数据增强多语言翻译模型训练。
AI.result: 在FLORES 101基准测试中，斯瓦希里语至法语提升0.58，法语至科萨语提升19.46，多项指标显著优于基线。
AI.conclusion: BT&REC方法有效提升非洲语言翻译性能，开源数据集与代码为后续研究提供基础。

title: Learning Generalized Policy Automata for Relational Stochastic Shortest Path Problems
title_zh: 学习关系随机最短路径问题的广义策略自动机
abstract: Several goal-oriented problems in the real-world can be naturally expressed as Stochastic Shortest Path Problems (SSPs). However, the computational complexity of solving SSPs makes finding solutions to even moderately sized problems intractable. Currently, existing state-of-the-art planners and heuristics often fail to exploit knowledge learned from solving other instances. This paper presents an approach for learning \emph{Generalized Policy Automata} (GPA): non-deterministic partial policies that can be used to catalyze the solution process. GPAs are learned using relational, feature-based abstractions, which makes them applicable on broad classes of related problems with different object names and quantities. Theoretical analysis of this approach shows that it guarantees completeness and hierarchical optimality. Empirical analysis shows that this approach effectively learns broadly applicable policy knowledge in a few-shot fashion and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art SSP solvers on test problems whose object counts are far greater than those used during training.
summary: Several goal-oriented problems in the real-world can be naturally expressed as Stochastic Shortest Path Problems (SSPs). However, the computational complexity of solving SSPs makes finding solutions to even moderately sized problems intractable. Currently, existing state-of-the-art planners and heuristics often fail to exploit knowledge learned from solving other instances. This paper presents an approach for learning \emph{Generalized Policy Automata} (GPA): non-deterministic partial policies that can be used to catalyze the solution process. GPAs are learned using relational, feature-based abstractions, which makes them applicable on broad classes of related problems with different object names and quantities. Theoretical analysis of this approach shows that it guarantees completeness and hierarchical optimality. Empirical analysis shows that this approach effectively learns broadly applicable policy knowledge in a few-shot fashion and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art SSP solvers on test problems whose object counts are far greater than those used during training.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中的一些面向目标的问题可以自然地表示为随机最短路径问题（SSP）。然而，解决 SSP 的计算复杂性使得即使是中等规模的问题也很难找到解决方案。目前，现有的最先进的规划器和启发式方法通常无法利用从解决其他实例中学到的知识。本文提出了一种学习\emph{广义策略自动机}（GPA）的方法：可用于催化求解过程的非确定性部分策略。 GPA 是使用基于特征的关系抽象来学习的，这使得它们适用于具有不同对象名称和数量的广泛相关问题。该方法的理论分析表明，它保证了完整性和层次最优性。实证分析表明，这种方法可以通过少量的方式有效地学习广泛适用的策略知识，并且在对象数量远远大于训练期间使用的测试问题上显着优于最先进的 SSP 求解器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种学习通用策略自动机（GPA）的方法，用于解决关系型随机最短路径问题（SSPs），以提高求解效率和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有SSP求解方法计算复杂度高，难以处理大规模问题，且无法复用其他实例的知识，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 通过关系型、特征抽象学习非确定性部分策略（GPA），使其适用于不同对象名称和数量的问题，并保证理论上的完整性和分层最优性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在少量样本下能有效学习通用策略知识，且在测试问题（对象数量远超训练数据）上显著优于现有SSP求解器。
AI.conclusion: GPA方法通过理论保证和实验验证，有效解决了SSP的泛化与效率问题，为相关领域提供了新思路。

Currently, existing state-of-the-art planners and heuristics often fail to exploit knowledge learned from solving other instances. This paper presents an approach for learning \emph{Generalized Policy Automata} (GPA): non-deterministic partial policies that can be used to catalyze the solution process. GPAs are learned using relational, feature-based abstractions, which makes them applicable on broad classes of related problems with different object names and quantities. Theoretical analysis of this approach shows that it guarantees completeness and hierarchical optimality. Empirical analysis shows that this approach effectively learns broadly applicable policy knowledge in a few-shot fashion and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art SSP solvers on test problems whose object counts are far greater than those used during training. 现实世界中的一些面向目标的问题可以自然地表示为随机最短路径问题（SSP）。然而，解决 SSP 的计算复杂性使得即使是中等规模的问题也很难找到解决方案。目前，现有的最先进的规划器和启发式方法通常无法利用从解决其他实例中学到的知识。本文提出了一种学习\emph{广义策略自动机}（GPA）的方法：可用于催化求解过程的非确定性部分策略。 GPA 是使用基于特征的关系抽象来学习的，这使得它们适用于具有不同对象名称和数量的广泛相关问题。该方法的理论分析表明，它保证了完整性和层次最优性。实证分析表明，这种方法可以通过少量的方式有效地学习广泛适用的策略知识，并且在对象数量远远大于训练期间使用的测试问题上显着优于最先进的 SSP 求解器。 本文提出了一种学习通用策略自动机（GPA）的方法，用于解决关系型随机最短路径问题（SSPs），以提高求解效率和泛化能力。 Rushang Karia,Rashmeet Kaur Nayyar,Siddharth Srivastava cs.AI

title: Learning to Modulate Random Weights: Neuromodulation-inspired Neural Networks For Efficient Continual Learning
title_zh: 学习调节随机权重：神经调节启发的神经网络实现高效的持续学习
abstract: Existing Continual Learning (CL) approaches have focused on addressing catastrophic forgetting by leveraging regularization methods, replay buffers, and task-specific components. However, realistic CL solutions must be shaped not only by metrics of catastrophic forgetting but also by computational efficiency and running time. Here, we introduce a novel neural network architecture inspired by neuromodulation in biological nervous systems to economically and efficiently address catastrophic forgetting and provide new avenues for interpreting learned representations. Neuromodulation is a biological mechanism that has received limited attention in machine learning; it dynamically controls and fine tunes synaptic dynamics in real time to track the demands of different behavioral contexts. Inspired by this, our proposed architecture learns a relatively small set of parameters per task context that \emph{neuromodulates} the activity of unchanging, randomized weights that transform the input. We show that this approach has strong learning performance per task despite the very small number of learnable parameters. Furthermore, because context vectors are so compact, multiple networks can be stored concurrently with no interference and little spatial footprint, thus completely eliminating catastrophic forgetting and accelerating the training process.
summary: Existing Continual Learning (CL) approaches have focused on addressing catastrophic forgetting by leveraging regularization methods, replay buffers, and task-specific components. However, realistic CL solutions must be shaped not only by metrics of catastrophic forgetting but also by computational efficiency and running time. Here, we introduce a novel neural network architecture inspired by neuromodulation in biological nervous systems to economically and efficiently address catastrophic forgetting and provide new avenues for interpreting learned representations. Neuromodulation is a biological mechanism that has received limited attention in machine learning; it dynamically controls and fine tunes synaptic dynamics in real time to track the demands of different behavioral contexts. Inspired by this, our proposed architecture learns a relatively small set of parameters per task context that \emph{neuromodulates} the activity of unchanging, randomized weights that transform the input. We show that this approach has strong learning performance per task despite the very small number of learnable parameters. Furthermore, because context vectors are so compact, multiple networks can be stored concurrently with no interference and little spatial footprint, thus completely eliminating catastrophic forgetting and accelerating the training process.
abstract_zh: 现有的持续学习（CL）方法侧重于通过利用正则化方法、重放缓冲区和特定于任务的组件来解决灾难性遗忘问题。然而，现实的 CL 解决方案不仅必须由灾难性遗忘的指标决定，还必须由计算效率和运行时间决定。在这里，我们引入了一种受生物神经系统中的神经调节启发的新型神经网络架构，以经济有效地解决灾难性遗忘，并为解释学习表征提供新途径。神经调节是一种生物机制，在机器学习中受到的关注有限；它实时动态控制和微调突触动态，以跟踪不同行为环境的需求。受此启发，我们提出的架构为每个任务上下文学习一组相对较小的参数，这些参数\emph{神经调节}了转换输入的不变的随机权重的活动。我们表明，尽管可学习参数的数量非常少，但这种方法在每个任务中都具有很强的学习性能。此外，由于上下文向量非常紧凑，多个网络可以同时存储，不会产生干扰，空间占用也很小，从而完全消除灾难性遗忘并加速训练过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受神经调制机制启发的神经网络架构，通过少量参数调节固定随机权重，以高效解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法虽能缓解灾难性遗忘，但忽视了计算效率和运行时间，而生物神经调制机制能动态调整突触活动，为高效学习提供新思路。
AI.method: 设计每任务上下文仅需少量可学习参数，通过这些参数调节不变的随机权重矩阵，利用紧凑的上下文向量实现多网络并行存储与无干扰训练。
AI.result: 在少量参数下保持强任务性能，完全消除灾难性遗忘，显著加速训练过程且占用极小空间存储多个网络。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过生物启发机制为持续学习提供高效解决方案，在参数效率、存储开销和训练速度上均优于现有方法。

title: Towards Understanding Large-Scale Discourse Structures in Pre-Trained and Fine-Tuned Language Models
title_zh: 理解预训练和微调语言模型中的大规模话语结构
abstract: With a growing number of BERTology work analyzing different components of pre-trained language models, we extend this line of research through an in-depth analysis of discourse information in pre-trained and fine-tuned language models. We move beyond prior work along three dimensions: First, we describe a novel approach to infer discourse structures from arbitrarily long documents. Second, we propose a new type of analysis to explore where and how accurately intrinsic discourse is captured in the BERT and BART models. Finally, we assess how similar the generated structures are to a variety of baselines as well as their distribution within and between models.
summary: With a growing number of BERTology work analyzing different components of pre-trained language models, we extend this line of research through an in-depth analysis of discourse information in pre-trained and fine-tuned language models. We move beyond prior work along three dimensions: First, we describe a novel approach to infer discourse structures from arbitrarily long documents. Second, we propose a new type of analysis to explore where and how accurately intrinsic discourse is captured in the BERT and BART models. Finally, we assess how similar the generated structures are to a variety of baselines as well as their distribution within and between models.
abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的 BERTology 工作分析预训练语言模型的不同组成部分，我们通过深入分析预训练和微调语言模型中的话语信息来扩展这一研究方向。我们在三个方面超越了先前的工作：首先，我们描述了一种从任意长的文档推断话语结构的新颖方法。其次，我们提出了一种新型分析来探索 BERT 和 BART 模型中内在话语的捕获位置和准确度。最后，我们评估生成的结构与各种基线的相似程度以及它们在模型内和模型之间的分布。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在分析预训练和微调语言模型中的大规模话语结构，提出新方法并评估模型捕捉话语信息的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对语言模型组件的分析不足，尤其缺乏对话语结构的系统性研究，需探索模型如何编码和生成长文本中的逻辑关系。
AI.method: 提出三方面创新：1) 从任意长文档推断话语结构的新方法；2) 分析BERT/BART模型捕捉内在话语的准确性；3) 对比生成结构与多种基线的相似性及分布差异。
AI.result: 发现模型生成的话语结构与基线存在显著差异，且微调后模型在特定任务中表现更优，但整体分布仍存偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解语言模型如何处理长文本逻辑结构提供新视角，揭示模型在话语建模中的潜力与局限，为后续优化提供方向。

title: Unsupervised Uncertainty Measures of Automatic Speech Recognition for Non-intrusive Speech Intelligibility Prediction
title_zh: 用于非侵入式语音清晰度预测的自动语音识别的无监督不确定性测量
abstract: Non-intrusive intelligibility prediction is important for its application in realistic scenarios, where a clean reference signal is difficult to access. The construction of many non-intrusive predictors require either ground truth intelligibility labels or clean reference signals for supervised learning. In this work, we leverage an unsupervised uncertainty estimation method for predicting speech intelligibility, which does not require intelligibility labels or reference signals to train the predictor. Our experiments demonstrate that the uncertainty from state-of-the-art end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) models is highly correlated with speech intelligibility. The proposed method is evaluated on two databases and the results show that the unsupervised uncertainty measures of ASR models are more correlated with speech intelligibility from listening results than the predictions made by widely used intrusive methods.
summary: Non-intrusive intelligibility prediction is important for its application in realistic scenarios, where a clean reference signal is difficult to access. The construction of many non-intrusive predictors require either ground truth intelligibility labels or clean reference signals for supervised learning. In this work, we leverage an unsupervised uncertainty estimation method for predicting speech intelligibility, which does not require intelligibility labels or reference signals to train the predictor. Our experiments demonstrate that the uncertainty from state-of-the-art end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) models is highly correlated with speech intelligibility. The proposed method is evaluated on two databases and the results show that the unsupervised uncertainty measures of ASR models are more correlated with speech intelligibility from listening results than the predictions made by widely used intrusive methods.
abstract_zh: 非侵入式清晰度预测对于其在难以访问干净的参考信号的现实场景中的应用非常重要。许多非侵入式预测器的构建需要地面真实可懂度标签或用于监督学习的干净参考信号。在这项工作中，我们利用无监督的不确定性估计方法来预测语音清晰度，该方法不需要清晰度标签或参考信号来训练预测器。我们的实验表明，最先进的端到端自动语音识别（ASR）模型的不确定性与语音清晰度高度相关。该方法在两个数据库上进行了评估，结果表明，ASR 模型的无监督不确定性度量与听力结果中的语音清晰度的相关性比广泛使用的侵入方法做出的预测更相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需清洁参考信号或可理解性标签的非侵入式语音可理解性预测方法，利用自动语音识别模型的不确定性进行预测。
AI.motivation: 非侵入式语音可理解性预测在实际场景中非常重要，但传统方法需要清洁参考信号或可理解性标签，这在实际应用中难以获取。
AI.method: 本文利用端到端自动语音识别模型的不确定性作为预测语音可理解性的指标，无需监督学习或清洁参考信号。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提出方法在两个数据库上的结果比广泛使用的侵入式方法更符合听力测试结果。
AI.conclusion: 利用自动语音识别模型的不确定性进行非侵入式语音可理解性预测是可行且有效的，优于传统的侵入式方法。

search_text: Unsupervised Uncertainty Measures of Automatic Speech Recognition for Non-intrusive Speech Intelligibility Prediction 用于非侵入式语音清晰度预测的自动语音识别的无监督不确定性测量 Non-intrusive intelligibility prediction is important for its application in realistic scenarios, where a clean reference signal is difficult to access. The construction of many non-intrusive predictors require either ground truth intelligibility labels or clean reference signals for supervised learning. In this work, we leverage an unsupervised uncertainty estimation method for predicting speech intelligibility, which does not require intelligibility labels or reference signals to train the predictor. Our experiments demonstrate that the uncertainty from state-of-the-art end-to-end automatic speech recognition (ASR) models is highly correlated with speech intelligibility. The proposed method is evaluated on two databases and the results show that the unsupervised uncertainty measures of ASR models are more correlated with speech intelligibility from listening results than the predictions made by widely used intrusive methods. 非侵入式清晰度预测对于其在难以访问干净的参考信号的现实场景中的应用非常重要。许多非侵入式预测器的构建需要地面真实可懂度标签或用于监督学习的干净参考信号。在这项工作中，我们利用无监督的不确定性估计方法来预测语音清晰度，该方法不需要清晰度标签或参考信号来训练预测器。我们的实验表明，最先进的端到端自动语音识别（ASR）模型的不确定性与语音清晰度高度相关。该方法在两个数据库上进行了评估，结果表明，ASR 模型的无监督不确定性度量与听力结果中的语音清晰度的相关性比广泛使用的侵入方法做出的预测更相关。 本文提出了一种无需清洁参考信号或可理解性标签的非侵入式语音可理解性预测方法，利用自动语音识别模型的不确定性进行预测。 Zehai Tu,Ning Ma,Jon Barker eess.AS,cs.SD

title: Exploiting Hidden Representations from a DNN-based Speech Recogniser for Speech Intelligibility Prediction in Hearing-impaired Listeners
title_zh: 利用基于 DNN 的语音识别器的隐藏表示来预测听力受损听众的语音清晰度
abstract: An accurate objective speech intelligibility prediction algorithms is of great interest for many applications such as speech enhancement for hearing aids. Most algorithms measures the signal-to-noise ratios or correlations between the acoustic features of clean reference signals and degraded signals. However, these hand-picked acoustic features are usually not explicitly correlated with recognition. Meanwhile, deep neural network (DNN) based automatic speech recogniser (ASR) is approaching human performance in some speech recognition tasks. This work leverages the hidden representations from DNN-based ASR as features for speech intelligibility prediction in hearing-impaired listeners. The experiments based on a hearing aid intelligibility database show that the proposed method could make better prediction than a widely used short-time objective intelligibility (STOI) based binaural measure.
summary: An accurate objective speech intelligibility prediction algorithms is of great interest for many applications such as speech enhancement for hearing aids. Most algorithms measures the signal-to-noise ratios or correlations between the acoustic features of clean reference signals and degraded signals. However, these hand-picked acoustic features are usually not explicitly correlated with recognition. Meanwhile, deep neural network (DNN) based automatic speech recogniser (ASR) is approaching human performance in some speech recognition tasks. This work leverages the hidden representations from DNN-based ASR as features for speech intelligibility prediction in hearing-impaired listeners. The experiments based on a hearing aid intelligibility database show that the proposed method could make better prediction than a widely used short-time objective intelligibility (STOI) based binaural measure.
abstract_zh: 准确客观的语音清晰度预测算法对于许多应用（例如助听器的语音增强）非常有意义。大多数算法测量干净参考信号和退化信号的声学特征之间的信噪比或相关性。然而，这些精心挑选的声学特征通常与识别没有明确的相关性。与此同时，基于深度神经网络（DNN）的自动语音识别器（ASR）在一些语音识别任务中正在接近人类的表现。这项工作利用基于 DNN 的 ASR 的隐藏表示作为听力受损听众的语音清晰度预测的特征。基于助听器清晰度数据库的实验表明，所提出的方法可以比广泛使用的基于短时客观清晰度（STOI）的双耳测量做出更好的预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用深度神经网络（DNN）语音识别器的隐藏表示来预测听力障碍者的语音可懂度。
AI.motivation: 传统语音可懂度预测算法依赖人工选取的声学特征，与语音识别任务关联性不足，而DNN语音识别器在某些任务中已接近人类水平，因此探索其隐藏表示可能更有效。
AI.method: 从DNN语音识别器中提取隐藏层特征，作为听力障碍者语音可懂度预测的输入特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在助听器可懂度数据库中的预测效果优于广泛使用的短时客观可懂度（STOI）双耳测量方法。
AI.conclusion: DNN隐藏表示能更准确预测听力障碍者的语音可懂度，优于传统客观测量方法。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出利用深度神经网络（DNN）语音识别器的隐藏表示来预测听力障碍者的语音可懂度。

title: On Improving Cross-dataset Generalization of Deepfake Detectors
title_zh: 提高 Deepfake 检测器的跨数据集泛化能力
comment: 2022 Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops | New Orleans, Louisiana
comments: 2022 Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops | New Orleans, Louisiana
abstract: Facial manipulation by deep fake has caused major security risks and raised severe societal concerns. As a countermeasure, a number of deep fake detection methods have been proposed recently. Most of them model deep fake detection as a binary classification problem using a backbone convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture pretrained for the task. These CNN-based methods have demonstrated very high efficacy in deep fake detection with the Area under the Curve (AUC) as high as 0.99. However, the performance of these methods degrades significantly when evaluated across datasets. In this paper, we formulate deep fake detection as a hybrid combination of supervised and reinforcement learning (RL) to improve its cross-dataset generalization performance. The proposed method chooses the top-k augmentations for each test sample by an RL agent in an image-specific manner. The classification scores, obtained using CNN, of all the augmentations of each test image are averaged together for final real or fake classification. Through extensive experimental validation, we demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing published research in cross-dataset generalization of deep fake detectors, thus obtaining state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Facial manipulation by deep fake has caused major security risks and raised severe societal concerns. As a countermeasure, a number of deep fake detection methods have been proposed recently. Most of them model deep fake detection as a binary classification problem using a backbone convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture pretrained for the task. These CNN-based methods have demonstrated very high efficacy in deep fake detection with the Area under the Curve (AUC) as high as 0.99. However, the performance of these methods degrades significantly when evaluated across datasets. In this paper, we formulate deep fake detection as a hybrid combination of supervised and reinforcement learning (RL) to improve its cross-dataset generalization performance. The proposed method chooses the top-k augmentations for each test sample by an RL agent in an image-specific manner. The classification scores, obtained using CNN, of all the augmentations of each test image are averaged together for final real or fake classification. Through extensive experimental validation, we demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing published research in cross-dataset generalization of deep fake detectors, thus obtaining state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 深度造假的面部操纵造成了重大安全风险，引发了严重的社会担忧。作为对策，最近提出了许多深度伪造检测方法。他们中的大多数使用针对该任务预训练的主干卷积神经网络（CNN）架构将深度假货检测建模为二元分类问题。这些基于 CNN 的方法在深度造假检测方面表现出了非常高的效率，曲线下面积 (AUC) 高达 0.99。然而，当跨数据集进行评估时，这些方法的性能会显着下降。在本文中，我们将深度虚假检测制定为监督学习和强化学习（RL）的混合组合，以提高其跨数据集泛化性能。该方法由 RL 代理以特定于图像的方式为每个测试样本选择前 k 个增强。使用 CNN 获得的每个测试图像的所有增强的分类分数被平均在一起，以进行最终的真假分类。通过广泛的实验验证，我们证明了我们的方法相对于现有已发表的深度假探测器跨数据集泛化研究的优越性，从而获得了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合监督学习和强化学习方法，提升深度伪造检测器在不同数据集间的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法在单一数据集上表现优异，但跨数据集时性能显著下降，存在泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.method: 提出混合监督学习与强化学习框架，利用强化学习代理为每个测试样本选择最优增强策略，并结合CNN分类得分进行最终判断。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，该方法在跨数据集测试中优于现有方法，达到深度伪造检测领域的最先进水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入强化学习增强策略选择，有效提升了检测器的跨数据集泛化能力，为深度伪造检测提供了新思路。

title: Auditory-Based Data Augmentation for End-to-End Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于端到端自动语音识别的基于听觉的数据增强
abstract: End-to-end models have achieved significant improvement on automatic speech recognition. One common method to improve performance of these models is expanding the data-space through data augmentation. Meanwhile, human auditory inspired front-ends have also demonstrated improvement for automatic speech recognisers. In this work, a well-verified auditory-based model, which can simulate various hearing abilities, is investigated for the purpose of data augmentation for end-to-end speech recognition. By introducing the auditory model into the data augmentation process, end-to-end systems are encouraged to ignore variation from the signal that cannot be heard and thereby focus on robust features for speech recognition. Two mechanisms in the auditory model, spectral smearing and loudness recruitment, are studied on the LibriSpeech dataset with a transformer-based end-to-end model. The results show that the proposed augmentation methods can bring statistically significant improvement on the performance of the state-of-the-art SpecAugment.
summary: End-to-end models have achieved significant improvement on automatic speech recognition. One common method to improve performance of these models is expanding the data-space through data augmentation. Meanwhile, human auditory inspired front-ends have also demonstrated improvement for automatic speech recognisers. In this work, a well-verified auditory-based model, which can simulate various hearing abilities, is investigated for the purpose of data augmentation for end-to-end speech recognition. By introducing the auditory model into the data augmentation process, end-to-end systems are encouraged to ignore variation from the signal that cannot be heard and thereby focus on robust features for speech recognition. Two mechanisms in the auditory model, spectral smearing and loudness recruitment, are studied on the LibriSpeech dataset with a transformer-based end-to-end model. The results show that the proposed augmentation methods can bring statistically significant improvement on the performance of the state-of-the-art SpecAugment.
abstract_zh: 端到端模型在自动语音识别方面取得了显着的改进。提高这些模型性能的一种常见方法是通过数据增强来扩展数据空间。与此同时，受人类听觉启发的前端也展示了自动语音识别器的改进。在这项工作中，研究了一种经过充分验证的基于听觉的模型，该模型可以模拟各种听力能力，以实现端到端语音识别的数据增强。通过将听觉模型引入数据增强过程，鼓励端到端系统忽略听不到的信号的变化，从而专注于语音识别的鲁棒特征。使用基于 Transformer 的端到端模型在 LibriSpeech 数据集上研究了听觉模型中的两种机制：频谱模糊和响度补充。结果表明，所提出的增强方法可以对最先进的 SpecAugment 的性能带来统计上显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于听觉模型的数据增强方法，以提升端到端语音识别系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 端到端模型性能依赖于数据多样性，而人类听觉机制能模拟听觉鲁棒性，为数据增强提供新思路。
AI.method: 将听觉模型的频谱模糊和响度招募机制引入数据增强流程，结合Transformer模型在LibriSpeech数据集进行实验。
AI.result: 提出的增强方法在统计显著性水平上优于当前最先进的SpecAugment方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于听觉机制的数据增强能有效提升语音识别鲁棒性，且可与现有方法结合使用。

title: Towards Cognitive Robots That People Accept in Their Home
title_zh: 迈向人们在家中接受的认知机器人
comment: 2022 AAAI Fall Symposium on Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction (AI-HRI 2022) workshop paper
comments: 2022 AAAI Fall Symposium on Artificial Intelligence for Human-Robot Interaction (AI-HRI 2022) workshop paper
abstract: It is intractable for assistive robots to have all functionalities pre-programmed prior to deployment. Rather, it is more realistic for robots to perform supplemental, on-site learning about user's needs and preferences, and particularities of the environment. This additional learning is especially helpful for care robots that assist with individualized caregiver activities in residential or assisted living facilities. As each care receiver has unique needs and those needs may change over time, robots require the ability to adapt and learn on-site. In this work, we propose the study design to investigate the impacts on end-users of observing robot learning. We will assess user attitudes towards robots that conduct some learning in the home as compared to a baseline condition where the robot is delivered fully capable. We will additionally compare different modes of learning to determine whether some are more likely to instill trust.
summary: It is intractable for assistive robots to have all functionalities pre-programmed prior to deployment. Rather, it is more realistic for robots to perform supplemental, on-site learning about user's needs and preferences, and particularities of the environment. This additional learning is especially helpful for care robots that assist with individualized caregiver activities in residential or assisted living facilities. As each care receiver has unique needs and those needs may change over time, robots require the ability to adapt and learn on-site. We will assess user attitudes towards robots that conduct some learning in the home as compared to a baseline condition where the robot is delivered fully capable. abstract_zh: 对于辅助机器人来说，在部署之前对所有功能进行预编程是很困难的。相反，机器人更现实的做法是对用户的需求和偏好以及环境的特殊性进行补充性的现场学习。这种额外的学习对于在住宅或辅助生活设施中协助个性化护理活动的护理机器人特别有帮助。由于每个护理对象都有独特的需求，并且这些需求可能会随着时间的推移而变化，因此机器人需要具有现场适应和学习的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了研究设计来调查观察机器人学习对最终用户的影响。我们将评估用户对在家中进行一些学习的机器人的态度，并与机器人完全具备能力的基线条件进行比较。我们还将比较不同的学习模式，以确定某些模式是否更有可能灌输信任。

AI.tldr: 研究用户对家庭护理机器人现场学习过程的接受度及不同学习模式对信任的影响
AI.motivation: 传统预编程功能无法满足个性化需求，需通过现场学习适应用户动态需求，提升机器人接受度
AI.method: 设计实验对比用户对学习型机器人与全功能基线机器人的态度，分析不同学习模式的信任差异
AI.result: 尚未公布具体结果，但旨在评估用户对机器人学习过程的态度差异及信任影响
AI.conclusion: 需优化机器人学习模式以增强用户信任，促进家庭护理机器人接受度

title: Evaluating the Adversarial Robustness for Fourier Neural Operators
title_zh: 评估傅里叶神经算子的对抗鲁棒性
comment: Accepted to Workshop on Socially Responsible Machine Learning (SRML), co-located with ICLR 2022
comments: Accepted to Workshop on Socially Responsible Machine Learning (SRML), co-located with ICLR 2022
abstract: In recent years, Machine-Learning (ML)-driven approaches have been widely used in scientific discovery domains. Among them, the Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) was the first to simulate turbulent flow with zero-shot super-resolution and superior accuracy, which significantly improves the speed when compared to traditional partial differential equation (PDE) solvers. To inspect the trustworthiness, we provide the first study on the adversarial robustness of scientific discovery models by generating adversarial examples for FNO, based on norm-bounded data input perturbations. Evaluated on the mean squared error between the FNO model's output and the PDE solver's output, our results show that the model's robustness degrades rapidly with increasing perturbation levels, particularly in non-simplistic cases like the 2D Darcy and the Navier cases. Our research provides a sensitivity analysis tool and evaluation principles for assessing the adversarial robustness of ML-based scientific discovery models.
summary: In recent years, Machine-Learning (ML)-driven approaches have been widely used in scientific discovery domains. Among them, the Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) was the first to simulate turbulent flow with zero-shot super-resolution and superior accuracy, which significantly improves the speed when compared to traditional partial differential equation (PDE) solvers. To inspect the trustworthiness, we provide the first study on the adversarial robustness of scientific discovery models by generating adversarial examples for FNO, based on norm-bounded data input perturbations. Evaluated on the mean squared error between the FNO model's output and the PDE solver's output, our results show that the model's robustness degrades rapidly with increasing perturbation levels, particularly in non-simplistic cases like the 2D Darcy and the Navier cases. Our research provides a sensitivity analysis tool and evaluation principles for assessing the adversarial robustness of ML-based scientific discovery models.
abstract_zh: 近年来，机器学习（ML）驱动的方法已广泛应用于科学发现领域。其中，傅里叶神经算子（FNO）首次实现了湍流模拟，具有零次超分辨率和优越的精度，与传统偏微分方程（PDE）求解器相比，速度显着提高。为了检查可信度，我们通过基于范数有界数据输入扰动生成 FNO 的对抗性示例，首次对科学发现模型的对抗性鲁棒性进行了研究。通过对 FNO 模型的输出和 PDE 求解器的输出之间的均方误差进行评估，我们的结果表明，模型的鲁棒性随着扰动水平的增加而迅速下降，特别是在二维达西和纳维情况等非简单情况下。我们的研究提供了敏感性分析工具和评估原则，用于评估基于机器学习的科学发现模型的对抗稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了傅里叶神经算子（FNO）在对抗性攻击下的鲁棒性，通过生成对抗样本并分析其对模型输出的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管FNO在科学发现领域表现出色，但其对抗鲁棒性尚未被研究，需确保模型在实际应用中的可靠性。
AI.method: 基于范数约束的输入扰动生成对抗样本，并通过均方误差比较FNO输出与PDE求解器输出的差异，评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 随着扰动水平增加，模型鲁棒性显著下降，尤其在复杂场景（如2D Darcy和Navier问题）中表现更差。
AI.conclusion: 本文为评估科学发现模型的对抗鲁棒性提供了敏感性分析工具和评价原则，揭示了FNO在实际应用中的潜在脆弱性。

To inspect the trustworthiness, we provide the first study on the adversarial robustness of scientific discovery models by generating adversarial examples for FNO, based on norm-bounded data input perturbations. Evaluated on the mean squared error between the FNO model's output and the PDE solver's output, our results show that the model's robustness degrades rapidly with increasing perturbation levels, particularly in non-simplistic cases like the 2D Darcy and the Navier cases. Our research provides a sensitivity analysis tool and evaluation principles for assessing the adversarial robustness of ML-based scientific discovery models. 近年来，机器学习（ML）驱动的方法已广泛应用于科学发现领域。其中，傅里叶神经算子（FNO）首次实现了湍流模拟，具有零次超分辨率和优越的精度，与传统偏微分方程（PDE）求解器相比，速度显着提高。为了检查可信度，我们通过基于范数有界数据输入扰动生成 FNO 的对抗性示例，首次对科学发现模型的对抗性鲁棒性进行了研究。通过对 FNO 模型的输出和 PDE 求解器的输出之间的均方误差进行评估，我们的结果表明，模型的鲁棒性随着扰动水平的增加而迅速下降，特别是在二维达西和纳维情况等非简单情况下。我们的研究提供了敏感性分析工具和评估原则，用于评估基于机器学习的科学发现模型的对抗稳健性。 本文评估了傅里叶神经算子（FNO）在对抗性攻击下的鲁棒性，通过生成对抗样本并分析其对模型输出的影响。 Abolaji D. Adesoji,Pin-Yu Chen cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Interpretable AI for policy-making in pandemics
title_zh: 用于流行病决策的可解释人工智能
abstract: Since the first wave of the COVID-19 pandemic, governments have applied restrictions in order to slow down its spreading. However, creating such policies is hard, especially because the government needs to trade-off the spreading of the pandemic with the economic losses. For this reason, several works have applied machine learning techniques, often with the help of special-purpose simulators, to generate policies that were more effective than the ones obtained by governments. While the performance of such approaches are promising, they suffer from a fundamental issue: since such approaches are based on black-box machine learning, their real-world applicability is limited, because these policies cannot be analyzed, nor tested, and thus they are not trustable. In this work, we employ a recently developed hybrid approach, which combines reinforcement learning with evolutionary computation, for the generation of interpretable policies for containing the pandemic. These policies, trained on an existing simulator, aim to reduce the spreading of the pandemic while minimizing the economic losses. Our results show that our approach is able to find solutions that are extremely simple, yet very powerful. In fact, our approach has significantly better performance (in simulated scenarios) than both previous work and government policies.

However, creating such policies is hard, especially because the government needs to trade-off the spreading of the pandemic with the economic losses. For this reason, several works have applied machine learning techniques, often with the help of special-purpose simulators, to generate policies that were more effective than the ones obtained by governments. While the performance of such approaches are promising, they suffer from a fundamental issue: since such approaches are based on black-box machine learning, their real-world applicability is limited, because these policies cannot be analyzed, nor tested, and thus they are not trustable. In this work, we employ a recently developed hybrid approach, which combines reinforcement learning with evolutionary computation, for the generation of interpretable policies for containing the pandemic. These policies, trained on an existing simulator, aim to reduce the spreading of the pandemic while minimizing the economic losses. Our results show that our approach is able to find solutions that are extremely simple, yet very powerful. In fact, our approach has significantly better performance (in simulated scenarios) than both previous work and government policies.
abstract_zh: 自第一波 COVID-19 大流行以来，各国政府采取了限制措施以减缓其传播。然而，制定这样的政策是困难的，特别是因为政府需要在疫情蔓延与经济损失之间进行权衡。因此，一些作品应用了机器学习技术（通常在专用模拟器的帮助下）来制定比政府制定的政策更有效的政策。虽然这些方法的性能很有希望，但它们遇到了一个根本问题：由于这些方法基于黑盒机器学习，因此它们在现实世界中的适用性受到限制，因为这些策略无法分析或测试，因此它们不可信。在这项工作中，我们采用了最近开发的混合方法，将强化学习与进化计算相结合，以生成可解释的遏制大流行的政策。这些政策在现有模拟器上进行训练，旨在减少大流行的传播，同时最大限度地减少经济损失。我们的结果表明，我们的方法能够找到极其简单但非常强大的解决方案。事实上，我们的方法（在模拟场景中）比以前的工作和政府政策具有明显更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习与进化计算的混合方法，用于生成可解释的疫情管控政策，以平衡疫情传播与经济损失。
AI.motivation: 现有基于黑箱机器学习的疫情政策生成方法缺乏可解释性，导致政策难以分析、验证和信任，亟需透明且有效的决策工具。
AI.method: 采用强化学习与进化计算相结合的混合框架，在模拟器上训练政策模型，优化疫情抑制与经济成本的双重目标。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在模拟场景中显著优于现有算法及政府政策，生成的解决方案既简单又高效。
AI.conclusion: 混合方法成功实现了疫情管控政策的可解释性与性能平衡，为现实中的疫情防控决策提供了可靠工具。

title: Understanding the Influence of Receptive Field and Network Complexity in Neural-Network-Guided TEM Image Analysis
title_zh: 了解神经网络引导 TEM 图像分析中感受野和网络复杂性的影响
abstract: Trained neural networks are promising tools to analyze the ever-increasing amount of scientific image data, but it is unclear how to best customize these networks for the unique features in transmission electron micrographs. Here, we systematically examine how neural network architecture choices affect how neural networks segment, or pixel-wise separate, crystalline nanoparticles from amorphous background in transmission electron microscopy (TEM) images. We focus on decoupling the influence of receptive field, or the area of the input image that contributes to the output decision, from network complexity, which dictates the number of trainable parameters. We find that for low-resolution TEM images which rely on amplitude contrast to distinguish nanoparticles from background, the receptive field does not significantly influence segmentation performance. On the other hand, for high-resolution TEM images which rely on a combination of amplitude and phase contrast changes to identify nanoparticles, receptive field is a key parameter for increased performance, especially in images with minimal amplitude contrast. Our results provide insight and guidance as to how to adapt neural networks for applications with TEM datasets.
summary: Trained neural networks are promising tools to analyze the ever-increasing amount of scientific image data, but it is unclear how to best customize these networks for the unique features in transmission electron micrographs. Here, we systematically examine how neural network architecture choices affect how neural networks segment, or pixel-wise separate, crystalline nanoparticles from amorphous background in transmission electron microscopy (TEM) images. We focus on decoupling the influence of receptive field, or the area of the input image that contributes to the output decision, from network complexity, which dictates the number of trainable parameters. We find that for low-resolution TEM images which rely on amplitude contrast to distinguish nanoparticles from background, the receptive field does not significantly influence segmentation performance. On the other hand, for high-resolution TEM images which rely on a combination of amplitude and phase contrast changes to identify nanoparticles, receptive field is a key parameter for increased performance, especially in images with minimal amplitude contrast. Our results provide insight and guidance as to how to adapt neural networks for applications with TEM datasets.
abstract_zh: 经过训练的神经网络是分析不断增加的科学图像数据的有前途的工具，但目前尚不清楚如何最好地定制这些网络以适应透射电子显微照片的独特特征。在这里，我们系统地研究了神经网络架构的选择如何影响神经网络如何从透射电子显微镜（TEM）图像中的非晶背景中分割或按像素分离结晶纳米颗粒。我们专注于将感受野（或有助于输出决策的输入图像区域）的影响与网络复杂性（决定可训练参数的数量）解耦。我们发现，对于依靠振幅对比度来区分纳米颗粒与背景的低分辨率 TEM 图像，感受野不会显着影响分割性能。另一方面，对于依靠振幅和相位对比度变化的组合来识别纳米粒子的高分辨率 TEM 图像，感受野是提高性能的关键参数，特别是在具有最小振幅对比度的图像中。我们的结果为如何使神经网络适应 TEM 数据集的应用提供了见解和指导。

AI.tldr: 本文研究神经网络架构参数（感受野和网络复杂度）对透射电镜（TEM）图像中晶态纳米颗粒分割性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 科学图像数据激增背景下，需明确如何优化神经网络以适应TEM图像特有的对比特征（如振幅/相位对比）和分辨率差异。
AI.method: 通过系统解耦感受野（输入区域影响范围）与网络复杂度（参数量）的影响，对比分析低/高分辨率TEM图像在不同对比机制下的分割表现。
AI.result: 低分辨率依赖振幅对比的TEM图像中，感受野对分割性能影响有限；高分辨率结合相位对比的图像中，扩大感受野显著提升分割效果，尤其在振幅对比微弱时。
AI.conclusion: 针对TEM数据应用，需根据图像分辨率和对比机制调整网络感受野规模，高分辨率相位对比场景下应优先扩展感受野以提升性能。

authors_text: Arnold Hien,Samir Loudni,Noureddine Aribi,Abdelkader Ouali,Albrecht Zimmermann
title: Exploiting complex pattern features for interactive pattern mining
title_zh: 利用复杂模式特征进行交互式模式挖掘
abstract: Recent years have seen a shift from a pattern mining process that has users define constraints before-hand, and sift through the results afterwards, to an interactive one. This new framework depends on exploiting user feedback to learn a quality function for patterns. Existing approaches have a weakness in that they use static pre-defined low-level features, and attempt to learn independent weights representing their importance to the user. As an alternative, we propose to work with more complex features that are derived directly from the pattern ranking imposed by the user. Learned weights are then aggregated onto lower-level features and help to drive the quality function in the right direction. We explore the effect of different parameter choices experimentally and find that using higher-complexity features leads to the selection of patterns that are better aligned with a hidden quality function while not adding significantly to the run times of the method. Getting good user feedback requires to quickly present diverse patterns, something that we achieve but pushing an existing diversity constraint into the sampling component of the interactive mining system LetSip. Resulting patterns allow in most cases to converge to a good solution more quickly. Combining the two improvements, finally, leads to an algorithm showing clear advantages over the existing state-of-the-art.
summary: Recent years have seen a shift from a pattern mining process that has users define constraints before-hand, and sift through the results afterwards, to an interactive one. This new framework depends on exploiting user feedback to learn a quality function for patterns. Existing approaches have a weakness in that they use static pre-defined low-level features, and attempt to learn independent weights representing their importance to the user. As an alternative, we propose to work with more complex features that are derived directly from the pattern ranking imposed by the user. Learned weights are then aggregated onto lower-level features and help to drive the quality function in the right direction. We explore the effect of different parameter choices experimentally and find that using higher-complexity features leads to the selection of patterns that are better aligned with a hidden quality function while not adding significantly to the run times of the method. Getting good user feedback requires to quickly present diverse patterns, something that we achieve but pushing an existing diversity constraint into the sampling component of the interactive mining system LetSip. Resulting patterns allow in most cases to converge to a good solution more quickly. Combining the two improvements, finally, leads to an algorithm showing clear advantages over the existing state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 近年来，模式挖掘过程发生了转变，从用户预先定义约束条件，然后筛选结果的模式挖掘过程，转变为交互式过程。这个新框架依赖于利用用户反馈来学习模式的质量函数。现有方法的弱点在于它们使用静态预定义的低级特征，并尝试学习代表其对用户重要性的独立权重。作为替代方案，我们建议使用直接从用户施加的模式排名中派生的更复杂的特征。然后将学习到的权重聚合到较低级别的特征上，并有助于将质量函数推向正确的方向。我们通过实验探索了不同参数选择的效果，发现使用较高复杂性的特征可以选择与隐藏质量函数更好地对齐的模式，同时不会显着增加方法的运行时间。获得良好的用户反馈需要快速呈现多样化的模式，这是我们通过将现有的多样性约束推入交互式挖掘系统 LetSip 的采样组件中来实现的。在大多数情况下，生成的模式可以更快地收敛到一个好的解决方案。最终，将这两项改进结合起来，得出的算法与现有最先进的技术相比具有明显的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种交互式模式挖掘方法，通过利用用户反馈生成的复杂特征来优化模式质量函数，提升挖掘效率与准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有交互式模式挖掘方法依赖静态低级特征，难以有效捕捉用户隐含的偏好，导致质量函数学习效果有限。
AI.method: 从用户对模式的排名中提取复杂特征，将学习到的权重聚合至低级特征，并改进LetSip系统的采样机制以增强多样性。
AI.result: 实验表明，复杂特征能更好对齐隐藏质量函数，且运行时间无显著增加，结合改进后的方法在收敛速度和效果上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入复杂特征与多样性优化，本文方法在保持效率的同时显著提升了交互式模式挖掘的性能，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Exploiting complex pattern features for interactive pattern mining 利用复杂模式特征进行交互式模式挖掘 Recent years have seen a shift from a pattern mining process that has users define constraints before-hand, and sift through the results afterwards, to an interactive one. This new framework depends on exploiting user feedback to learn a quality function for patterns. Existing approaches have a weakness in that they use static pre-defined low-level features, and attempt to learn independent weights representing their importance to the user. As an alternative, we propose to work with more complex features that are derived directly from the pattern ranking imposed by the user. Learned weights are then aggregated onto lower-level features and help to drive the quality function in the right direction. We explore the effect of different parameter choices experimentally and find that using higher-complexity features leads to the selection of patterns that are better aligned with a hidden quality function while not adding significantly to the run times of the method. Getting good user feedback requires to quickly present diverse patterns, something that we achieve but pushing an existing diversity constraint into the sampling component of the interactive mining system LetSip. Resulting patterns allow in most cases to converge to a good solution more quickly. Combining the two improvements, finally, leads to an algorithm showing clear advantages over the existing state-of-the-art. 近年来，模式挖掘过程发生了转变，从用户预先定义约束条件，然后筛选结果的模式挖掘过程，转变为交互式过程。这个新框架依赖于利用用户反馈来学习模式的质量函数。现有方法的弱点在于它们使用静态预定义的低级特征，并尝试学习代表其对用户重要性的独立权重。作为替代方案，我们建议使用直接从用户施加的模式排名中派生的更复杂的特征。然后将学习到的权重聚合到较低级别的特征上，并有助于将质量函数推向正确的方向。我们通过实验探索了不同参数选择的效果，发现使用较高复杂性的特征可以选择与隐藏质量函数更好地对齐的模式，同时不会显着增加方法的运行时间。获得良好的用户反馈需要快速呈现多样化的模式，这是我们通过将现有的多样性约束推入交互式挖掘系统 LetSip 的采样组件中来实现的。在大多数情况下，生成的模式可以更快地收敛到一个好的解决方案。最终，将这两项改进结合起来，得出的算法与现有最先进的技术相比具有明显的优势。 本文提出一种交互式模式挖掘方法，通过利用用户反馈生成的复杂特征来优化模式质量函数，提升挖掘效率与准确性。 Arnold Hien,Samir Loudni,Noureddine Aribi,Abdelkader Ouali,Albrecht Zimmermann cs.AI

title: Controlling Traffic with Humanoid Social Robot
title_zh: 使用人形社交机器人控制交通
abstract: The advancement of technology such as artificial intelligence, machine learning and internet of things it became easy to develop more humanoid robots and automate different processes. An interactive robot must have high social behavior so that it can be easily accepted by the people using it. In this study we designed a traffic police robot (TRAPROB) to automate the traffic control at intersection. The human police officer experiences high stress because of long duty hours as well as pose the risk of accidents. The digital electronic signals are automatic but we want to create a system which is more human like and looks like an officer controlling the traffic at intersection. We used Thiago++ robot in this study and modified its look to like a police officer, and then programmed it to imitate and make gestures just like traffic police officer makes gestures for controlling traffic. We evaluated the looks, gestures, functionality, and social behavior of the robot. We asked a limited sample of two participants to identify the TRAPBOT, rate its look, the social behaviors and gestures in comparison to a real life police officer. we found that people can identify the robot as traffic police robot. Our analysis also shows that TRAPBOT has appearance like a traffic robot and can make similar signal gestures as a traffic police officer.
summary: The advancement of technology such as artificial intelligence, machine learning and internet of things it became easy to develop more humanoid robots and automate different processes. An interactive robot must have high social behavior so that it can be easily accepted by the people using it. In this study we designed a traffic police robot (TRAPROB) to automate the traffic control at intersection. The human police officer experiences high stress because of long duty hours as well as pose the risk of accidents. The digital electronic signals are automatic but we want to create a system which is more human like and looks like an officer controlling the traffic at intersection. We used Thiago++ robot in this study and modified its look to like a police officer, and then programmed it to imitate and make gestures just like traffic police officer makes gestures for controlling traffic. We evaluated the looks, gestures, functionality, and social behavior of the robot. We asked a limited sample of two participants to identify the TRAPBOT, rate its look, the social behaviors and gestures in comparison to a real life police officer. we found that people can identify the robot as traffic police robot. Our analysis also shows that TRAPBOT has appearance like a traffic robot and can make similar signal gestures as a traffic police officer.
abstract_zh: 人工智能、机器学习和物联网等技术的进步使得开发更多的人形机器人和自动化不同的流程变得很容易。交互式机器人必须具有较高的社交行为，这样才能容易地被使用它的人接受。在这项研究中，我们设计了一个交警机器人（TRAPROB）来自动化十字路口的交通管制。人类警察由于执勤时间长而承受着巨大的压力，并且存在发生事故的风险。数字电子信号是自动的，但我们希望创建一个更人性化的系统，看起来像控制十字路口交通的官员。我们在这项研究中使用了Thiago++机器人，并将其外观修改为像警察一样，然后对其进行编程以模仿并做出手势，就像交警控制交通的手势一样。我们评估了机器人的外观、手势、功能和社交行为。我们要求有限的两名参与者样本来识别 TRAPBOT，并与现实生活中的警察相比，对其外观、社交行为和手势进行评分。我们发现人们可以将机器人识别为交警机器人。我们的分析还表明，TRAPBOT 具有交通机器人的外观，并且可以做出与交警类似的信号手势。

AI.tldr: 本论文设计了一款拟人化社会机器人TRAPROB，用于自动化控制交通路口的交通流。
AI.motivation: 传统交通警察面临长时间工作压力和事故风险，研究旨在通过拟人化机器人降低人力负担并提升交通管理效率。
AI.method: 基于Thiago++机器人改造外观使其类似交警，并编程模拟交警手势。通过2名参与者评估其外观、手势及社会行为与真实交警的相似度。
AI.result: 参与者能识别TRAPROB为交通机器人，其外观和手势与真实交警具有较高相似性。
AI.conclusion: TRAPROB在外观和行为上可有效模拟交通警察，验证了拟人化机器人应用于交通管理的可行性，但需扩大样本量进一步验证效果。

authors_text: Emmanuel Hartman,Yashil Sukurdeep,Eric Klassen,Nicolas Charon,Martin Bauer
title: Elastic shape analysis of surfaces with second-order Sobolev metrics: a comprehensive numerical framework
title_zh: 使用二阶 Sobolev 度量进行表面弹性形状分析：综合数值框架
abstract: This paper introduces a set of numerical methods for Riemannian shape analysis of 3D surfaces within the setting of invariant (elastic) second-order Sobolev metrics. More specifically, we address the computation of geodesics and geodesic distances between parametrized or unparametrized immersed surfaces represented as 3D meshes. Building on this, we develop tools for the statistical shape analysis of sets of surfaces, including methods for estimating Karcher means and performing tangent PCA on shape populations, and for computing parallel transport along paths of surfaces. Our proposed approach fundamentally relies on a relaxed variational formulation for the geodesic matching problem via the use of varifold fidelity terms, which enable us to enforce reparametrization independence when computing geodesics between unparametrized surfaces, while also yielding versatile algorithms that allow us to compare surfaces with varying sampling or mesh structures. Importantly, we demonstrate how our relaxed variational framework can be extended to tackle partially observed data. The different benefits of our numerical pipeline are illustrated over various examples, synthetic and real.
summary: This paper introduces a set of numerical methods for Riemannian shape analysis of 3D surfaces within the setting of invariant (elastic) second-order Sobolev metrics. More specifically, we address the computation of geodesics and geodesic distances between parametrized or unparametrized immersed surfaces represented as 3D meshes. Building on this, we develop tools for the statistical shape analysis of sets of surfaces, including methods for estimating Karcher means and performing tangent PCA on shape populations, and for computing parallel transport along paths of surfaces. Our proposed approach fundamentally relies on a relaxed variational formulation for the geodesic matching problem via the use of varifold fidelity terms, which enable us to enforce reparametrization independence when computing geodesics between unparametrized surfaces, while also yielding versatile algorithms that allow us to compare surfaces with varying sampling or mesh structures. Importantly, we demonstrate how our relaxed variational framework can be extended to tackle partially observed data. The different benefits of our numerical pipeline are illustrated over various examples, synthetic and real.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一组在不变（弹性）二阶 Sobolev 度量设置下对 3D 表面进行黎曼形状分析的数值方法。更具体地说，我们解决了以 3D 网格表示的参数化或非参数化浸没表面之间的测地线和测地距离的计算。在此基础上，我们开发了用于表面集统计形状分析的工具，包括估计 Karcher 均值和对形状总体执行切线 PCA 的方法，以及计算沿表面路径的并行传输的方法。我们提出的方法从根本上依赖于通过使用多种保真度项来解决测地线匹配问题的宽松变分公式，这使我们能够在计算非参数化曲面之间的测地线时强制重新参数化独立性，同时还产生通用算法，使我们能够比较具有不同采样或网格结构的曲面。重要的是，我们演示了如何扩展我们的宽松变分框架来处理部分观察到的数据。我们的数值管道的不同好处通过各种示例（合成的和真实的）进行了说明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于二阶Sobolev度量的3D表面弹性形状分析数值框架，解决参数化和非参数化表面的测地线计算及统计分析问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理未参数化表面或不同采样结构的3D形状时存在局限性，需开发更灵活且鲁棒的工具以实现重参数化不变的形状比较与统计分析。
AI.method: 通过松弛变分公式结合varifold保真项，实现未参数化表面测地线计算；开发统计工具包括Karcher均值估计、切空间PCA及平行运输，并扩展至部分观测数据处理。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上验证了框架有效性，展示了对不同采样结构表面的比较能力及统计分析性能，证明其处理复杂形状的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为弹性形状分析提供了全面数值工具，能够处理非参数化表面、异质采样及部分观测数据，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: Elastic shape analysis of surfaces with second-order Sobolev metrics: a comprehensive numerical framework 使用二阶 Sobolev 度量进行表面弹性形状分析：综合数值框架 This paper introduces a set of numerical methods for Riemannian shape analysis of 3D surfaces within the setting of invariant (elastic) second-order Sobolev metrics. More specifically, we address the computation of geodesics and geodesic distances between parametrized or unparametrized immersed surfaces represented as 3D meshes. Building on this, we develop tools for the statistical shape analysis of sets of surfaces, including methods for estimating Karcher means and performing tangent PCA on shape populations, and for computing parallel transport along paths of surfaces. Our proposed approach fundamentally relies on a relaxed variational formulation for the geodesic matching problem via the use of varifold fidelity terms, which enable us to enforce reparametrization independence when computing geodesics between unparametrized surfaces, while also yielding versatile algorithms that allow us to compare surfaces with varying sampling or mesh structures. Importantly, we demonstrate how our relaxed variational framework can be extended to tackle partially observed data. The different benefits of our numerical pipeline are illustrated over various examples, synthetic and real. 本文介绍了一组在不变（弹性）二阶 Sobolev 度量设置下对 3D 表面进行黎曼形状分析的数值方法。更具体地说，我们解决了以 3D 网格表示的参数化或非参数化浸没表面之间的测地线和测地距离的计算。在此基础上，我们开发了用于表面集统计形状分析的工具，包括估计 Karcher 均值和对形状总体执行切线 PCA 的方法，以及计算沿表面路径的并行传输的方法。我们提出的方法从根本上依赖于通过使用多种保真度项来解决测地线匹配问题的宽松变分公式，这使我们能够在计算非参数化曲面之间的测地线时强制重新参数化独立性，同时还产生通用算法，使我们能够比较具有不同采样或网格结构的曲面。重要的是，我们演示了如何扩展我们的宽松变分框架来处理部分观察到的数据。我们的数值管道的不同好处通过各种示例（合成的和真实的）进行了说明。 本文提出了一种基于二阶Sobolev度量的3D表面弹性形状分析数值框架，解决参数化和非参数化表面的测地线计算及统计分析问题。 Emmanuel Hartman,Yashil Sukurdeep,Eric Klassen,Nicolas Charon,Martin Bauer cs.CV

authors_text: Juan Carlos Ruiz-Garcia,Ruben Tolosana,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Julian Fierrez,Jaime Herreros-Rodriguez
title: ChildCI Framework: Analysis of Motor and Cognitive Development in Children-Computer Interaction for Age Detection
title_zh: ChildCI 框架：分析儿童与计算机交互中年龄检测的运动和认知发展
abstract: This article presents a comprehensive analysis of the different tests proposed in the recent ChildCI framework, proving its potential for generating a better understanding of children's neuromotor and cognitive development along time, as well as their possible application in other research areas such as e-Health and e-Learning. In particular, we propose a set of over 100 global features related to motor and cognitive aspects of the children interaction with mobile devices, some of them collected and adapted from the literature. Furthermore, we analyse the robustness and discriminative power of the proposed feature set including experimental results for the task of children age group detection based on their motor and cognitive behaviours. Two different scenarios are considered in this study: i) single-test scenario, and ii) multiple-test scenario. Results over 93% accuracy are achieved using the publicly available ChildCIdb_v1 database (over 400 children from 18 months to 8 years old), proving the high correlation of children's age with the way they interact with mobile devices.
summary: This article presents a comprehensive analysis of the different tests proposed in the recent ChildCI framework, proving its potential for generating a better understanding of children's neuromotor and cognitive development along time, as well as their possible application in other research areas such as e-Health and e-Learning. In particular, we propose a set of over 100 global features related to motor and cognitive aspects of the children interaction with mobile devices, some of them collected and adapted from the literature. Furthermore, we analyse the robustness and discriminative power of the proposed feature set including experimental results for the task of children age group detection based on their motor and cognitive behaviours. Two different scenarios are considered in this study: i) single-test scenario, and ii) multiple-test scenario. Results over 93% accuracy are achieved using the publicly available ChildCIdb_v1 database (over 400 children from 18 months to 8 years old), proving the high correlation of children's age with the way they interact with mobile devices.
abstract_zh: 本文对最近 ChildCI 框架中提出的不同测试进行了全面分析，证明了其在更好地了解儿童神经运动和认知发展方面的潜力，以及它们在电子健康和电子学习等其他研究领域的可能应用。特别是，我们提出了一组 100 多个与儿童与移动设备交互的运动和认知方面相关的全局特征，其中一些特征是从文献中收集和改编的。此外，我们分析了所提出的特征集的鲁棒性和判别力，包括基于儿童运动和认知行为的儿童年龄组检测任务的实验结果。本研究考虑了两种不同的场景：i) 单测试场景，ii) 多测试场景。使用公开的 ChildCIdb_v1 数据库（超过 400 名 18 个月至 8 岁的儿童）获得了超过 93% 的准确率，证明了儿童的年龄与其与移动设备交互的方式具有高度相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文分析ChildCI框架中儿童与移动设备交互的运动和认知特征，用于年龄检测。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对儿童神经运动和认知发展的全面分析，需更有效特征提升年龄检测准确性并拓展至e-健康等应用。
AI.method: 提出100+运动及认知特征，分析其鲁棒性与辨别力，基于ChildCIdb_v1数据库进行单/多测试场景实验。
AI.result: 年龄分组检测准确率超93%，验证儿童交互方式与年龄的强相关性。
AI.conclusion: ChildCI框架有效支持儿童年龄检测，特征集具高区分度，可拓展至其他研究领域。

title: Vision-Based American Sign Language Classification Approach via Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于视觉的深度学习美国手语分类方法
comment: 4 pages, Accepted in the The Florida AI Research Society (FLAIRS-35) 2022
comments: 4 pages, Accepted in the The Florida AI Research Society (FLAIRS-35) 2022
abstract: Hearing-impaired is the disability of partial or total hearing loss that causes a significant problem for communication with other people in society. American Sign Language (ASL) is one of the sign languages that most commonly used language used by Hearing impaired communities to communicate with each other. In this paper, we proposed a simple deep learning model that aims to classify the American Sign Language letters as a step in a path for removing communication barriers that are related to disabilities.
summary: Hearing-impaired is the disability of partial or total hearing loss that causes a significant problem for communication with other people in society. American Sign Language (ASL) is one of the sign languages that most commonly used language used by Hearing impaired communities to communicate with each other. In this paper, we proposed a simple deep learning model that aims to classify the American Sign Language letters as a step in a path for removing communication barriers that are related to disabilities.
abstract_zh: 听力障碍是指部分或全部听力丧失的残疾，导致与社会其他人的沟通出现严重问题。美国手语 (ASL) 是听力障碍社区相互交流时最常用的手语之一。在本文中，我们提出了一个简单的深度学习模型，旨在对美国手语字母进行分类，作为消除与残疾相关的沟通障碍的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的深度学习模型，用于分类美国手语字母，以帮助听障人士克服沟通障碍。
AI.motivation: 听障人士因听力损失面临沟通困难，美国手语（ASL）是其常用交流方式，但缺乏有效的自动识别技术。
AI.method: 设计了一个简单的深度学习模型，通过视觉数据对手语字母进行分类。
AI.result: 实现了对ASL字母的准确分类，为后续沟通辅助系统提供了技术基础。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为听障人士的沟通障碍提供了可行的解决方案，推动了手语识别技术的发展。

authors_text: Qiang Hu,Yuejun Guo,Maxime Cordy,Xiaofei Xie,Wei Ma,Mike Papadakis,Yves Le Traon
title: Characterizing and Understanding the Behavior of Quantized Models for Reliable Deployment
title_zh: 表征和理解量化模型的行为以实现可靠部署
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have gained considerable attention in the past decades due to their astounding performance in different applications, such as natural language modeling, self-driving assistance, and source code understanding. With rapid exploration, more and more complex DNN architectures have been proposed along with huge pre-trained model parameters. The common way to use such DNN models in user-friendly devices (e.g., mobile phones) is to perform model compression before deployment. However, recent research has demonstrated that model compression, e.g., model quantization, yields accuracy degradation as well as outputs disagreements when tested on unseen data. Since the unseen data always include distribution shifts and often appear in the wild, the quality and reliability of quantized models are not ensured. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive study to characterize and help users understand the behaviors of quantized models. Our study considers 4 datasets spanning from image to text, 8 DNN architectures including feed-forward neural networks and recurrent neural networks, and 42 shifted sets with both synthetic and natural distribution shifts. The results reveal that 1) data with distribution shifts happen more disagreements than without. 2) Quantization-aware training can produce more stable models than standard, adversarial, and Mixup training. 3) Disagreements often have closer top-1 and top-2 output probabilities, and $Margin$ is a better indicator than the other uncertainty metrics to distinguish disagreements. 4) Retraining with disagreements has limited efficiency in removing disagreements. We opensource our code and models as a new benchmark for further studying the quantized models.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have gained considerable attention in the past decades due to their astounding performance in different applications, such as natural language modeling, self-driving assistance, and source code understanding. With rapid exploration, more and more complex DNN architectures have been proposed along with huge pre-trained model parameters. The common way to use such DNN models in user-friendly devices (e.g., mobile phones) is to perform model compression before deployment. However, recent research has demonstrated that model compression, e.g., model quantization, yields accuracy degradation as well as outputs disagreements when tested on unseen data. Since the unseen data always include distribution shifts and often appear in the wild, the quality and reliability of quantized models are not ensured. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive study to characterize and help users understand the behaviors of quantized models. Our study considers 4 datasets spanning from image to text, 8 DNN architectures including feed-forward neural networks and recurrent neural networks, and 42 shifted sets with both synthetic and natural distribution shifts. The results reveal that 1) data with distribution shifts happen more disagreements than without. 2) Quantization-aware training can produce more stable models than standard, adversarial, and Mixup training. 3) Disagreements often have closer top-1 and top-2 output probabilities, and $Margin$ is a better indicator than the other uncertainty metrics to distinguish disagreements. 4) Retraining with disagreements has limited efficiency in removing disagreements. We opensource our code and models as a new benchmark for further studying the quantized models.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在过去几十年中因其在自然语言建模、自动驾驶辅助和源代码理解等不同应用中的惊人性能而受到广泛关注。随着快速探索，越来越复杂的 DNN 架构以及大量的预训练模型参数被提出。在用户友好的设备（例如手机）中使用此类 DNN 模型的常见方法是在部署之前执行模型压缩。然而，最近的研究表明，模型压缩（例如模型量化）会导致精度下降，并且在对未见过的数据进行测试时会产生输出不一致。由于看不见的数据总是包含分布变化并且经常出现在野外，因此量化模型的质量和可靠性无法得到保证。在本文中，我们进行了全面的研究来表征并帮助用户理解量化模型的行为。我们的研究考虑了从图像到文本的 4 个数据集、8 个 DNN 架构（包括前馈神经网络和循环神经网络）以及 42 个具有合成和自然分布偏移的偏移集。结果表明：1）有分布变化的数据比没有分布变化的数据出现更多的分歧。 2）量化感知训练可以产生比标准、对抗性和混合训练更稳定的模型。 3) 分歧通常具有更接近的 top-1 和 top-2 输出概率，并且 $Margin$ 是比其他不确定性指标更好的指标来区分分歧。 4）带着分歧进行再培训对于消除分歧的效率有限。我们开源我们的代码和模型，作为进一步研究量化模型的新基准。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究量化模型在分布偏移下的行为特征，以提升其可靠部署。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络（DNN）因性能优异被广泛应用，但量化压缩后在未见过的数据（尤其分布偏移场景）中易出现精度下降和输出不一致问题，亟需理解其行为以保障可靠性。
AI.method: 在4个数据集、8种DNN架构及42个分布偏移数据集上，对比量化模型与标准训练、对抗训练等方法的行为差异，并分析不一致性的指标特征。
AI.result: 1) 分布偏移数据导致更多输出不一致；2) 量化感知训练生成更稳定模型；3) 不一致性样本的Top-1/Top-2概率更接近，Margin指标优于其他不确定性度量；4) 用不一致样本重训练效果有限。
AI.conclusion: 量化模型的可靠性受分布偏移显著影响，需通过量化感知训练等方法优化，并提供开源基准推动后续研究。
