search_text: Characterizing and Understanding the Behavior of Quantized Models for Reliable Deployment 表征和理解量化模型的行为以实现可靠部署 Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have gained considerable attention in the past decades due to their astounding performance in different applications, such as natural language modeling, self-driving assistance, and source code understanding. With rapid exploration, more and more complex DNN architectures have been proposed along with huge pre-trained model parameters. The common way to use such DNN models in user-friendly devices (e.g., mobile phones) is to perform model compression before deployment. However, recent research has demonstrated that model compression, e.g., model quantization, yields accuracy degradation as well as outputs disagreements when tested on unseen data. Since the unseen data always include distribution shifts and often appear in the wild, the quality and reliability of quantized models are not ensured. In this paper, we conduct a comprehensive study to characterize and help users understand the behaviors of quantized models. Our study considers 4 datasets spanning from image to text, 8 DNN architectures including feed-forward neural networks and recurrent neural networks, and 42 shifted sets with both synthetic and natural distribution shifts. The results reveal that 1) data with distribution shifts happen more disagreements than without. 2) Quantization-aware training can produce more stable models than standard, adversarial, and Mixup training. 3) Disagreements often have closer top-1 and top-2 output probabilities, and $Margin$ is a better indicator than the other uncertainty metrics to distinguish disagreements. 4) Retraining with disagreements has limited efficiency in removing disagreements. We opensource our code and models as a new benchmark for further studying the quantized models. 深度神经网络（DNN）在过去几十年中因其在自然语言建模、自动驾驶辅助和源代码理解等不同应用中的惊人性能而受到广泛关注。随着快速探索，越来越复杂的 DNN 架构以及大量的预训练模型参数被提出。在用户友好的设备（例如手机）中使用此类 DNN 模型的常见方法是在部署之前执行模型压缩。然而，最近的研究表明，模型压缩（例如模型量化）会导致精度下降，并且在对未见过的数据进行测试时会产生输出不一致。由于看不见的数据总是包含分布变化并且经常出现在野外，因此量化模型的质量和可靠性无法得到保证。在本文中，我们进行了全面的研究来表征并帮助用户理解量化模型的行为。我们的研究考虑了从图像到文本的 4 个数据集、8 个 DNN 架构（包括前馈神经网络和循环神经网络）以及 42 个具有合成和自然分布偏移的偏移集。结果表明：1）有分布变化的数据比没有分布变化的数据出现更多的分歧。 2）量化感知训练可以产生比标准、对抗性和混合训练更稳定的模型。 3) 分歧通常具有更接近的 top-1 和 top-2 输出概率，并且 $Margin$ 是比其他不确定性指标更好的指标来区分分歧。 4）带着分歧进行再培训对于消除分歧的效率有限。我们开源我们的代码和模型，作为进一步研究量化模型的新基准。 该论文研究量化模型在分布偏移下的行为特征，以提升其可靠部署。 Qiang Hu,Yuejun Guo,Maxime Cordy,Xiaofei Xie,Wei Ma,Mike Papadakis,Yves Le Traon cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.SE

authors_text: Chenglong Wang,Yun Liu,Fen Wang,Chengxiu Zhang,Yida Wang,Mei Yuan,Guang Yang
title: Towards Reliable and Explainable AI Model for Solid Pulmonary Nodule Diagnosis
title_zh: 建立可靠且可解释的肺实性结节诊断人工智能模型
abstract: Lung cancer has the highest mortality rate of deadly cancers in the world. Early detection is essential to treatment of lung cancer. However, detection and accurate diagnosis of pulmonary nodules depend heavily on the experiences of radiologists and can be a heavy workload for them. Computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) systems have been developed to assist radiologists in nodule detection and diagnosis, greatly easing the workload while increasing diagnosis accuracy. Recent development of deep learning, greatly improved the performance of CAD systems. However, lack of model reliability and interpretability remains a major obstacle for its large-scale clinical application. In this work, we proposed a multi-task explainable deep-learning model for pulmonary nodule diagnosis. Our neural model can not only predict lesion malignancy but also identify relevant manifestations. Further, the location of each manifestation can also be visualized for visual interpretability. Our proposed neural model achieved a test AUC of 0.992 on LIDC public dataset and a test AUC of 0.923 on our in-house dataset. Moreover, our experimental results proved that by incorporating manifestation identification tasks into the multi-task model, the accuracy of the malignancy classification can also be improved. This multi-task explainable model may provide a scheme for better interaction with the radiologists in a clinical environment.
summary: Lung cancer has the highest mortality rate of deadly cancers in the world. Early detection is essential to treatment of lung cancer. However, detection and accurate diagnosis of pulmonary nodules depend heavily on the experiences of radiologists and can be a heavy workload for them. Computer-aided diagnosis (CAD) systems have been developed to assist radiologists in nodule detection and diagnosis, greatly easing the workload while increasing diagnosis accuracy. Recent development of deep learning, greatly improved the performance of CAD systems. However, lack of model reliability and interpretability remains a major obstacle for its large-scale clinical application. In this work, we proposed a multi-task explainable deep-learning model for pulmonary nodule diagnosis. Our neural model can not only predict lesion malignancy but also identify relevant manifestations. Further, the location of each manifestation can also be visualized for visual interpretability. Our proposed neural model achieved a test AUC of 0.992 on LIDC public dataset and a test AUC of 0.923 on our in-house dataset. Moreover, our experimental results proved that by incorporating manifestation identification tasks into the multi-task model, the accuracy of the malignancy classification can also be improved. This multi-task explainable model may provide a scheme for better interaction with the radiologists in a clinical environment.
abstract_zh: 肺癌是世界上死亡率最高的致命癌症。早期发现对于肺癌的治疗至关重要。然而，肺结节的检测和准确诊断很大程度上依赖于放射科医师的经验，对他们来说工作量很大。计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统的发展可以帮助放射科医生进行结节检测和诊断，大大减轻工作量，同时提高诊断准确性。最近深度学习的发展，极大地提高了CAD系统的性能。然而，模型可靠性和可解释性的缺乏仍然是其大规模临床应用的主要障碍。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于肺结节诊断的多任务可解释深度学习模型。我们的神经模型不仅可以预测病变的恶性程度，还可以识别相关的表现。此外，每个表现的位置也可以被可视化以实现视觉解释。我们提出的神经模型在 LIDC 公共数据集上的测试 AUC 为 0.992，在我们的内部数据集上的测试 AUC 为 0.923。此外，我们的实验结果证明，通过将表现识别任务纳入多任务模型中，还可以提高恶性肿瘤分类的准确性。这种多任务可解释模型可以提供一种在临床环境中与放射科医生更好交互的方案。

AI.tldr: 开发可靠且可解释的深度学习模型用于肺结节良恶性诊断，并通过多任务学习提升模型性能与可视化解释能力。
AI.motivation: 现有计算机辅助诊断系统虽提升效率，但缺乏模型可靠性与可解释性，难以满足临床大规模应用需求。
AI.method: 设计多任务深度学习框架，同步实现结节恶性分类与病灶特征识别，并通过可视化技术增强模型可解释性。
AI.result: 在LIDC数据集上测试AUC达0.992，在内部数据集上达0.923，多任务学习显著提升分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过多任务协同与可视化解释，为放射科医生提供可靠决策支持，推动AI在临床诊断中的实际应用。

authors_text: Mariana-Iuliana Georgescu,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Andreea-Iuliana Miron,Olivian Savencu,Nicolae-Catalin Ristea,Nicolae Verga,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: Multimodal Multi-Head Convolutional Attention with Various Kernel Sizes for Medical Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 用于医学图像超分辨率的具有不同内核大小的多模态多头卷积注意力
abstract: Super-resolving medical images can help physicians in providing more accurate diagnostics. In many situations, computed tomography (CT) or magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) techniques capture several scans (modes) during a single investigation, which can jointly be used (in a multimodal fashion) to further boost the quality of super-resolution results. To this end, we propose a novel multimodal multi-head convolutional attention module to super-resolve CT and MRI scans. Our attention module uses the convolution operation to perform joint spatial-channel attention on multiple concatenated input tensors, where the kernel (receptive field) size controls the reduction rate of the spatial attention, and the number of convolutional filters controls the reduction rate of the channel attention, respectively. We introduce multiple attention heads, each head having a distinct receptive field size corresponding to a particular reduction rate for the spatial attention. We integrate our multimodal multi-head convolutional attention (MMHCA) into two deep neural architectures for super-resolution and conduct experiments on three data sets. Our empirical results show the superiority of our attention module over the state-of-the-art attention mechanisms used in super-resolution. Moreover, we conduct an ablation study to assess the impact of the components involved in our attention module, e.g. the number of inputs or the number of heads. Our code is freely available at https://github.com/lilygeorgescu/MHCA.
summary: Super-resolving medical images can help physicians in providing more accurate diagnostics. In many situations, computed tomography (CT) or magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) techniques capture several scans (modes) during a single investigation, which can jointly be used (in a multimodal fashion) to further boost the quality of super-resolution results. To this end, we propose a novel multimodal multi-head convolutional attention module to super-resolve CT and MRI scans. Our attention module uses the convolution operation to perform joint spatial-channel attention on multiple concatenated input tensors, where the kernel (receptive field) size controls the reduction rate of the spatial attention, and the number of convolutional filters controls the reduction rate of the channel attention, respectively. We introduce multiple attention heads, each head having a distinct receptive field size corresponding to a particular reduction rate for the spatial attention. We integrate our multimodal multi-head convolutional attention (MMHCA) into two deep neural architectures for super-resolution and conduct experiments on three data sets. Our empirical results show the superiority of our attention module over the state-of-the-art attention mechanisms used in super-resolution. Moreover, we conduct an ablation study to assess the impact of the components involved in our attention module, e.g. the number of inputs or the number of heads. Our code is freely available at https://github.com/lilygeorgescu/MHCA.
abstract_zh: 超分辨率医学图像可以帮助医生提供更准确的诊断。在许多情况下，计算机断层扫描 (CT) 或磁共振成像 (MRI) 技术在单次调查期间捕获多个扫描（模式），可以联合使用（以多模式方式）以进一步提高超分辨率结果的质量。为此，我们提出了一种新型多模态多头卷积注意力模块来超分辨率 CT 和 MRI 扫描。我们的注意力模块使用卷积运算对多个级联输入张量执行联合空间通道注意力，其中内核（感受野）大小控制空间注意力的减少率，卷积滤波器的数量分别控制通道注意力的减少率。我们引入多个注意力头，每个头具有不同的感受野大小，对应于空间注意力的特定降低率。我们将多模态多头卷积注意力（MMHCA）集成到两个深度神经架构中以实现超分辨率，并在三个数据集上进行实验。我们的实证结果表明，我们的注意力模块优于超分辨率中使用的最先进的注意力机制。此外，我们进行了一项消融研究，以评估我们的注意力模块中涉及的组件的影响，例如输入的数量或头的数量。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/lilygeorgescu/MHCA 免费获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态多头卷积注意力模块（MMHCA），用于提升医学图像超分辨率重建效果。
AI.motivation: 医学影像超分辨率技术可提升诊断准确性，而现有方法未能充分融合CT/MRI等多模态数据信息，限制了重建质量。
AI.method: 设计包含多尺度卷积核的多头注意力机制，通过空间-通道联合注意力操作处理多模态输入，利用不同感受野的卷积核控制空间/通道注意力的压缩比例，并集成至两种深度网络架构中。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，MMHCA模块优于现有注意力机制，消融实验证明了多头数量和输入模态数对性能的关键影响。
AI.conclusion: 提出的MMHCA模块通过多模态特征融合和多尺度注意力机制有效提升了医学图像超分辨率性能，代码已开源。

search_text: Multimodal Multi-Head Convolutional Attention with Various Kernel Sizes for Medical Image Super-Resolution 用于医学图像超分辨率的具有不同内核大小的多模态多头卷积注意力 Super-resolving medical images can help physicians in providing more accurate diagnostics. In many situations, computed tomography (CT) or magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) techniques capture several scans (modes) during a single investigation, which can jointly be used (in a multimodal fashion) to further boost the quality of super-resolution results. To this end, we propose a novel multimodal multi-head convolutional attention module to super-resolve CT and MRI scans. Our attention module uses the convolution operation to perform joint spatial-channel attention on multiple concatenated input tensors, where the kernel (receptive field) size controls the reduction rate of the spatial attention, and the number of convolutional filters controls the reduction rate of the channel attention, respectively. We introduce multiple attention heads, each head having a distinct receptive field size corresponding to a particular reduction rate for the spatial attention. We integrate our multimodal multi-head convolutional attention (MMHCA) into two deep neural architectures for super-resolution and conduct experiments on three data sets. Our empirical results show the superiority of our attention module over the state-of-the-art attention mechanisms used in super-resolution. Moreover, we conduct an ablation study to assess the impact of the components involved in our attention module, e.g. the number of inputs or the number of heads. Our code is freely available at https://github.com/lilygeorgescu/MHCA. 超分辨率医学图像可以帮助医生提供更准确的诊断。在许多情况下，计算机断层扫描 (CT) 或磁共振成像 (MRI) 技术在单次调查期间捕获多个扫描（模式），可以联合使用（以多模式方式）以进一步提高超分辨率结果的质量。为此，我们提出了一种新型多模态多头卷积注意力模块来超分辨率 CT 和 MRI 扫描。我们的注意力模块使用卷积运算对多个级联输入张量执行联合空间通道注意力，其中内核（感受野）大小控制空间注意力的减少率，卷积滤波器的数量分别控制通道注意力的减少率。我们引入多个注意力头，每个头具有不同的感受野大小，对应于空间注意力的特定降低率。我们将多模态多头卷积注意力（MMHCA）集成到两个深度神经架构中以实现超分辨率，并在三个数据集上进行实验。我们的实证结果表明，我们的注意力模块优于超分辨率中使用的最先进的注意力机制。此外，我们进行了一项消融研究，以评估我们的注意力模块中涉及的组件的影响，例如输入的数量或头的数量。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/lilygeorgescu/MHCA 免费获取。 本文提出一种多模态多头卷积注意力模块（MMHCA），用于提升医学图像超分辨率重建效果。 Mariana-Iuliana Georgescu,Radu Tudor Ionescu,Andreea-Iuliana Miron,Olivian Savencu,Nicolae-Catalin Ristea,Nicolae Verga,Fahad Shahbaz Khan eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ting-Wei Cheng,Jerry Chang,Ching-Chun Huang,Chin Kuo,Yun-Chien Cheng
title: Feature-enhanced Adversarial Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation Network for Pulmonary Embolism Annotation
title_zh: 用于肺栓塞注释的特征增强对抗性半监督语义分割网络
abstract: This study established a feature-enhanced adversarial semi-supervised semantic segmentation model to automatically annotate pulmonary embolism lesion areas in computed tomography pulmonary angiogram (CTPA) images. In current studies, all of the PE CTPA image segmentation methods are trained by supervised learning. However, the supervised learning models need to be retrained and the images need to be relabeled when the CTPA images come from different hospitals. This study proposed a semi-supervised learning method to make the model applicable to different datasets by adding a small amount of unlabeled images. By training the model with both labeled and unlabeled images, the accuracy of unlabeled images can be improved and the labeling cost can be reduced. Our semi-supervised segmentation model includes a segmentation network and a discriminator network. We added feature information generated from the encoder of segmentation network to the discriminator so that it can learn the similarity between predicted mask and ground truth mask. This HRNet-based architecture can maintain a higher resolution for convolutional operations so the prediction of small PE lesion areas can be improved. We used the labeled open-source dataset and the unlabeled National Cheng Kung University Hospital (NCKUH) (IRB number: B-ER-108-380) dataset to train the semi-supervised learning model, and the resulting mean intersection over union (mIOU), dice score, and sensitivity achieved 0.3510, 0.4854, and 0.4253, respectively on the NCKUH dataset. Then, we fine-tuned and tested the model with a small amount of unlabeled PE CTPA images from China Medical University Hospital (CMUH) (IRB number: CMUH110-REC3-173) dataset. Comparing the results of our semi-supervised model with the supervised model, the mIOU, dice score, and sensitivity improved from 0.2344, 0.3325, and 0.3151 to 0.3721, 0.5113, and 0.4967, respectively.

In current studies, all of the PE CTPA image segmentation methods are trained by supervised learning. However, the supervised learning models need to be retrained and the images need to be relabeled when the CTPA images come from different hospitals. This study proposed a semi-supervised learning method to make the model applicable to different datasets by adding a small amount of unlabeled images. By training the model with both labeled and unlabeled images, the accuracy of unlabeled images can be improved and the labeling cost can be reduced. Our semi-supervised segmentation model includes a segmentation network and a discriminator network. We added feature information generated from the encoder of segmentation network to the discriminator so that it can learn the similarity between predicted mask and ground truth mask. This HRNet-based architecture can maintain a higher resolution for convolutional operations so the prediction of small PE lesion areas can be improved. We used the labeled open-source dataset and the unlabeled National Cheng Kung University Hospital (NCKUH) (IRB number: B-ER-108-380) dataset to train the semi-supervised learning model, and the resulting mean intersection over union (mIOU), dice score, and sensitivity achieved 0.3510, 0.4854, and 0.4253, respectively on the NCKUH dataset. Then, we fine-tuned and tested the model with a small amount of unlabeled PE CTPA images from China Medical University Hospital (CMUH) (IRB number: CMUH110-REC3-173) dataset. Comparing the results of our semi-supervised model with the supervised model, the mIOU, dice score, and sensitivity improved from 0.2344, 0.3325, and 0.3151 to 0.3721, 0.5113, and 0.4967, respectively.
abstract_zh: 本研究建立了一种特征增强的对抗性半监督语义分割模型，用于自动注释计算机断层扫描肺血管造影（CTPA）图像中的肺栓塞病变区域。在目前的研究中，所有的PE CTPA图像分割方法都是通过监督学习来训练的。然而，当CTPA图像来自不同医院时，需要重新训练监督学习模型并且需要重新标记图像。本研究提出了一种半监督学习方法，通过添加少量未标记图像来使模型适用于不同的数据集。通过使用标记图像和未标记图像来训练模型，可以提高未标记图像的准确性并降低标记成本。我们的半监督分割模型包括分割网络和鉴别器网络。我们将分割网络的编码器生成的特征信息添加到鉴别器中，以便它可以学习预测掩模和地面真实掩模之间的相似性。这种基于 HRNet 的架构可以为卷积运算保持更高的分辨率，因此可以改善小 PE 病变区域的预测。我们使用标记的开源数据集和未标记的国立成功大学医院（NCKUH）（IRB编号：B-ER-108-380）数据集来训练半监督学习模型，所得的并集平均交集（mIOU）、骰子得分和灵敏度在NCKUH数据集上分别达到0.3510、0.4854和0.4253。然后，我们使用来自中国医科大学医院（CMUH）（IRB编号：CMUH110-REC3-173）数据集的少量未标记PE CTPA图像对模型进行微调和测试。将半监督模型的结果与监督模型的结果进行比较，mIOU、dice 得分和灵敏度分别从 0.2344、0.3325 和 0.3151 提高到 0.3721、0.5113 和 0.4967。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特征增强的对抗性半监督语义分割网络，用于自动标注CT肺动脉造影图像中的肺栓塞病变区域。
AI.motivation: 现有肺栓塞图像分割方法依赖全监督学习，需重新标注不同医院的数据，导致成本高且适应性差。半监督方法可通过少量未标注数据提升模型泛化能力并降低标注成本。
AI.method: 构建包含分割网络和判别器的半监督框架，将分割网络编码器生成的特征输入判别器以学习预测掩码与真实掩码的相似性。采用HRNet架构保持高分辨率，提升小病灶分割精度，并结合开源标注数据与未标注医院数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在NCKUH数据集上，模型达到mIOU 0.3510、Dice 0.4854、灵敏度0.4253；经少量CMUH未标注数据微调后，指标提升至mIOU 0.3721、Dice 0.5113、灵敏度0.4967，优于全监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 半监督方法有效提升了模型跨数据集性能，结合HRNet架构优化了小病灶检测，为减少人工标注依赖提供了可行方案。

search_text: Feature-enhanced Adversarial Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation Network for Pulmonary Embolism Annotation 用于肺栓塞注释的特征增强对抗性半监督语义分割网络 This study established a feature-enhanced adversarial semi-supervised semantic segmentation model to automatically annotate pulmonary embolism lesion areas in computed tomography pulmonary angiogram (CTPA) images. In current studies, all of the PE CTPA image segmentation methods are trained by supervised learning. However, the supervised learning models need to be retrained and the images need to be relabeled when the CTPA images come from different hospitals. By training the model with both labeled and unlabeled images, the accuracy of unlabeled images can be improved and the labeling cost can be reduced. Our semi-supervised segmentation model includes a segmentation network and a discriminator network. We added feature information generated from the encoder of segmentation network to the discriminator so that it can learn the similarity between predicted mask and ground truth mask. This HRNet-based architecture can maintain a higher resolution for convolutional operations so the prediction of small PE lesion areas can be improved. We used the labeled open-source dataset and the unlabeled National Cheng Kung University Hospital (NCKUH) (IRB number: B-ER-108-380) dataset to train the semi-supervised learning model, and the resulting mean intersection over union (mIOU), dice score, and sensitivity achieved 0.3510, 0.4854, and 0.4253, respectively on the NCKUH dataset. Then, we fine-tuned and tested the model with a small amount of unlabeled PE CTPA images from China Medical University Hospital (CMUH) (IRB number: CMUH110-REC3-173) dataset. Comparing the results of our semi-supervised model with the supervised model, the mIOU, dice score, and sensitivity improved from 0.2344, 0.3325, and 0.3151 to 0.3721, 0.5113, and 0.4967, respectively. 本研究建立了一种特征增强的对抗性半监督语义分割模型，用于自动注释计算机断层扫描肺血管造影（CTPA）图像中的肺栓塞病变区域。在目前的研究中，所有的PE CTPA图像分割方法都是通过监督学习来训练的。然而，当CTPA图像来自不同医院时，需要重新训练监督学习模型并且需要重新标记图像。本研究提出了一种半监督学习方法，通过添加少量未标记图像来使模型适用于不同的数据集。通过使用标记图像和未标记图像来训练模型，可以提高未标记图像的准确性并降低标记成本。我们的半监督分割模型包括分割网络和鉴别器网络。我们将分割网络的编码器生成的特征信息添加到鉴别器中，以便它可以学习预测掩模和地面真实掩模之间的相似性。这种基于 HRNet 的架构可以为卷积运算保持更高的分辨率，因此可以改善小 PE 病变区域的预测。我们使用标记的开源数据集和未标记的国立成功大学医院（NCKUH）（IRB编号：B-ER-108-380）数据集来训练半监督学习模型，所得的并集平均交集（mIOU）、骰子得分和灵敏度在NCKUH数据集上分别达到0.3510、0.4854和0.4253。然后，我们使用来自中国医科大学医院（CMUH）（IRB编号：CMUH110-REC3-173）数据集的少量未标记PE CTPA图像对模型进行微调和测试。将半监督模型的结果与监督模型的结果进行比较，mIOU、dice 得分和灵敏度分别从 0.2344、0.3325 和 0.3151 提高到 0.3721、0.5113 和 0.4967。 本文提出了一种基于特征增强的对抗性半监督语义分割网络，用于自动标注CT肺动脉造影图像中的肺栓塞病变区域。 Ting-Wei Cheng,Jerry Chang,Ching-Chun Huang,Chin Kuo,Yun-Chien Cheng eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: Learning Trajectory-Aware Transformer for Video Super-Resolution
title_zh: 学习用于视频超分辨率的轨迹感知变压器
abstract: Video super-resolution (VSR) aims to restore a sequence of high-resolution (HR) frames from their low-resolution (LR) counterparts. Although some progress has been made, there are grand challenges to effectively utilize temporal dependency in entire video sequences. Existing approaches usually align and aggregate video frames from limited adjacent frames (e.g., 5 or 7 frames), which prevents these approaches from satisfactory results. In this paper, we take one step further to enable effective spatio-temporal learning in videos. We propose a novel Trajectory-aware Transformer for Video Super-Resolution (TTVSR). In particular, we formulate video frames into several pre-aligned trajectories which consist of continuous visual tokens. For a query token, self-attention is only learned on relevant visual tokens along spatio-temporal trajectories. Compared with vanilla vision Transformers, such a design significantly reduces the computational cost and enables Transformers to model long-range features. We further propose a cross-scale feature tokenization module to overcome scale-changing problems that often occur in long-range videos. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed TTVSR over state-of-the-art models, by extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations in four widely-used video super-resolution benchmarks. Both code and pre-trained models can be downloaded at https://github.com/researchmm/TTVSR.
summary: Video super-resolution (VSR) aims to restore a sequence of high-resolution (HR) frames from their low-resolution (LR) counterparts. Although some progress has been made, there are grand challenges to effectively utilize temporal dependency in entire video sequences. Existing approaches usually align and aggregate video frames from limited adjacent frames (e.g., 5 or 7 frames), which prevents these approaches from satisfactory results. In this paper, we take one step further to enable effective spatio-temporal learning in videos. We propose a novel Trajectory-aware Transformer for Video Super-Resolution (TTVSR). In particular, we formulate video frames into several pre-aligned trajectories which consist of continuous visual tokens. For a query token, self-attention is only learned on relevant visual tokens along spatio-temporal trajectories. Compared with vanilla vision Transformers, such a design significantly reduces the computational cost and enables Transformers to model long-range features. We further propose a cross-scale feature tokenization module to overcome scale-changing problems that often occur in long-range videos. Experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed TTVSR over state-of-the-art models, by extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations in four widely-used video super-resolution benchmarks. Both code and pre-trained models can be downloaded at https://github.com/researchmm/TTVSR.
abstract_zh: 视频超分辨率 (VSR) 旨在从低分辨率 (LR) 帧中恢复一系列高分辨率 (HR) 帧。尽管已经取得了一些进展，但有效利用整个视频序列中的时间依赖性仍存在巨大挑战。现有方法通常从有限的相邻帧（例如，5 或 7 帧）对齐和聚合视频帧，这阻碍了这些方法获得令人满意的结果。在本文中，我们更进一步，在视频中实现有效的时空学习。我们提出了一种新颖的用于视频超分辨率（TTVSR）的轨迹感知变压器。特别是，我们将视频帧制定为几个由连续视觉标记组成的预先对齐的轨迹。对于查询标记，仅在沿时空轨迹的相关视觉标记上学习自注意力。与普通视觉 Transformers 相比，这样的设计显着降低了计算成本，并使 Transformers 能够对远程特征进行建模。我们进一步提出了一种跨尺度特征标记化模块，以克服长距离视频中经常出现的尺度变化问题。通过在四个广泛使用的视频超分辨率基准中进行广泛的定量和定性评估，实验结果证明了所提出的 TTVSR 相对于最先进模型的优越性。代码和预训练模型都可以在 https://github.com/researchmm/TTVSR 下载。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种轨迹感知的Transformer模型（TTVSR），用于视频超分辨率任务，旨在从低分辨率视频帧中恢复高质量的高分辨率帧。
AI.motivation: 现有视频超分辨率方法仅利用有限相邻帧的时序信息，难以建模长距离时空依赖关系，导致重建效果受限。本文希望通过更有效的时空特征建模提升视频超分辨率性能。
AI.method: 提出轨迹感知Transformer（TTVSR），将视频帧划分为连续视觉token的预对齐轨迹，通过轨迹内自注意力机制建模时空关系，并设计跨尺度特征分块模块解决长视频中的尺度变化问题。
AI.result: 在四个主流视频超分辨率基准测试中，TTVSR在定量和定性评估中均优于现有最先进方法，代码和预训练模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: TTVSR通过轨迹感知的时空建模和跨尺度特征处理，在计算效率和重建质量上实现了突破，为视频超分辨率提供了新思路。

title: Data-Free Quantization with Accurate Activation Clipping and Adaptive Batch Normalization
title_zh: 具有精确激活剪切和自适应批量归一化的无数据量化
abstract: Data-free quantization is a task that compresses the neural network to low bit-width without access to original training data. Most existing data-free quantization methods cause severe performance degradation due to inaccurate activation clipping range and quantization error, especially for low bit-width. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective data-free quantization method with accurate activation clipping and adaptive batch normalization. Accurate activation clipping (AAC) improves the model accuracy by exploiting accurate activation information from the full-precision model. Adaptive batch normalization firstly proposes to address the quantization error from distribution changes by updating the batch normalization layer adaptively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed data-free quantization method can yield surprisingly performance, achieving 64.33% top-1 accuracy of ResNet18 on ImageNet dataset, with 3.7% absolute improvement outperforming the existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Data-free quantization is a task that compresses the neural network to low bit-width without access to original training data. Most existing data-free quantization methods cause severe performance degradation due to inaccurate activation clipping range and quantization error, especially for low bit-width. In this paper, we present a simple yet effective data-free quantization method with accurate activation clipping and adaptive batch normalization. Accurate activation clipping (AAC) improves the model accuracy by exploiting accurate activation information from the full-precision model. Adaptive batch normalization firstly proposes to address the quantization error from distribution changes by updating the batch normalization layer adaptively. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed data-free quantization method can yield surprisingly performance, achieving 64.33% top-1 accuracy of ResNet18 on ImageNet dataset, with 3.7% absolute improvement outperforming the existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 无数据量化是一项将神经网络压缩到低位宽而无需访问原始训练数据的任务。大多数现有的无数据量化方法由于不准确的激活限幅范围和量化误差而导致严重的性能下降，特别是对于低位宽。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的无数据量化方法，具有精确的激活剪切和自适应批量归一化。准确激活裁剪 (AAC) 通过利用全精度模型中的准确激活信息来提高模型精度。自适应批量归一化首先提出通过自适应更新批量归一化层来解决分布变化引起的量化误差。大量实验表明，所提出的无数据量化方法可以产生令人惊讶的性能，在 ImageNet 数据集上实现 ResNet18 64.33% 的 top-1 准确率，绝对提高了 3.7%，优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需原始训练数据的神经网络量化方法，通过精确激活剪切和自适应批量归一化提升模型压缩效果。
AI.motivation: 现有无数据量化方法因激活值范围估计不准确和量化误差导致性能显著下降，尤其在低比特宽度下问题更突出。
AI.method: 提出精确激活剪切（AAC）利用全精度模型激活信息优化剪切范围，结合自适应批量归一化层动态调整分布变化带来的量化误差。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，ResNet18量化模型达到64.33%的Top-1准确率，较现有最优方法提升3.7%绝对值。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过双机制协同优化，在无需训练数据的前提下实现了更优的低比特量化性能，为模型压缩提供新思路。

authors_text: Catherine Ordun,Alexandra N. Cha,Edward Raff,Byron Gaskin,Alex Hanson,Mason Rule,Sanjay Purushotham,James L. Gulley
title: Intelligent Sight and Sound: A Chronic Cancer Pain Dataset
title_zh: 智能视觉和声音：慢性癌痛数据集
comment: Published as conference paper at the 35th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: Published as conference paper at the 35th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2021) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Cancer patients experience high rates of chronic pain throughout the treatment process. Assessing pain for this patient population is a vital component of psychological and functional well-being, as it can cause a rapid deterioration of quality of life. Existing work in facial pain detection often have deficiencies in labeling or methodology that prevent them from being clinically relevant. This paper introduces the first chronic cancer pain dataset, collected as part of the Intelligent Sight and Sound (ISS) clinical trial, guided by clinicians to help ensure that model findings yield clinically relevant results. The data collected to date consists of 29 patients, 509 smartphone videos, 189,999 frames, and self-reported affective and activity pain scores adopted from the Brief Pain Inventory (BPI). Using static images and multi-modal data to predict self-reported pain levels, early models show significant gaps between current methods available to predict pain today, with room for improvement. Due to the especially sensitive nature of the inherent Personally Identifiable Information (PII) of facial images, the dataset will be released under the guidance and control of the National Institutes of Health (NIH).
summary: Cancer patients experience high rates of chronic pain throughout the treatment process. Assessing pain for this patient population is a vital component of psychological and functional well-being, as it can cause a rapid deterioration of quality of life. Existing work in facial pain detection often have deficiencies in labeling or methodology that prevent them from being clinically relevant. This paper introduces the first chronic cancer pain dataset, collected as part of the Intelligent Sight and Sound (ISS) clinical trial, guided by clinicians to help ensure that model findings yield clinically relevant results. The data collected to date consists of 29 patients, 509 smartphone videos, 189,999 frames, and self-reported affective and activity pain scores adopted from the Brief Pain Inventory (BPI). Using static images and multi-modal data to predict self-reported pain levels, early models show significant gaps between current methods available to predict pain today, with room for improvement. Due to the especially sensitive nature of the inherent Personally Identifiable Information (PII) of facial images, the dataset will be released under the guidance and control of the National Institutes of Health (NIH).
abstract_zh: 癌症患者在整个治疗过程中经历慢性疼痛的几率很高。评估该患者群体的疼痛是心理和功能健康的重要组成部分，因为它可能导致生活质量迅速恶化。面部疼痛检测的现有工作通常在标签或方法上存在缺陷，导致其无法应用于临床。本文介绍了第一个慢性癌痛数据集，该数据集作为智能视听 (ISS) 临床试验的一部分收集，由临床医生指导，以帮助确保模型发现产生临床相关结果。迄今为止收集的数据包括 29 名患者、509 段智能手机视频、189,999 帧以及从简短疼痛量表 (BPI) 中采用的自我报告的情感和活动疼痛评分。早期模型使用静态图像和多模态数据来预测自我报告的疼痛水平，显示出当前可用于预测疼痛的方法之间存在显着差距，并且还有改进的空间。由于面部图像固有的个人身份信息（PII）特别敏感，该数据集将在美国国立卫生研究院（NIH）的指导和控制下发布。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了首个慢性癌症疼痛数据集，通过多模态数据预测患者自报疼痛水平，旨在改进现有疼痛评估方法。
AI.motivation: 癌症患者治疗过程中常伴随慢性疼痛，现有面部疼痛检测方法存在标签或方法缺陷，难以满足临床需求，需更精准的评估工具以提升患者生活质量。
AI.method: 通过Intelligent Sight and Sound临床试验收集29名患者的509段智能手机视频、189,999帧图像及基于BPI量表的疼痛评分，利用静态图像和多模态数据训练模型预测疼痛水平。
AI.result: 初步模型显示现有疼痛预测方法存在显著差距，需进一步优化；数据集因涉及敏感个人信息将由NIH指导发布。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为开发临床相关疼痛评估模型提供了基础，但当前方法仍需改进，强调了敏感医疗数据的规范管理必要性。

authors_text: Can Chen,Jingbo Zhou,Fan Wang,Xue Liu,Dejing Dou
title: Structure-aware Protein Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 结构感知蛋白质自我监督学习
abstract: Protein representation learning methods have shown great potential to yield useful representation for many downstream tasks, especially on protein classification. Moreover, a few recent studies have shown great promise in addressing insufficient labels of proteins with self-supervised learning methods. However, existing protein language models are usually pretrained on protein sequences without considering the important protein structural information. To this end, we propose a novel structure-aware protein self-supervised learning method to effectively capture structural information of proteins. In particular, a well-designed graph neural network (GNN) model is pretrained to preserve the protein structural information with self-supervised tasks from a pairwise residue distance perspective and a dihedral angle perspective, respectively. Furthermore, we propose to leverage the available protein language model pretrained on protein sequences to enhance the self-supervised learning. Specifically, we identify the relation between the sequential information in the protein language model and the structural information in the specially designed GNN model via a novel pseudo bi-level optimization scheme. Experiments on several supervised downstream tasks verify the effectiveness of our proposed method.The code of the proposed method is available in \url{https://github.com/GGchen1997/STEPS_Bioinformatics}.
summary: Protein representation learning methods have shown great potential to yield useful representation for many downstream tasks, especially on protein classification. Moreover, a few recent studies have shown great promise in addressing insufficient labels of proteins with self-supervised learning methods. However, existing protein language models are usually pretrained on protein sequences without considering the important protein structural information. To this end, we propose a novel structure-aware protein self-supervised learning method to effectively capture structural information of proteins. In particular, a well-designed graph neural network (GNN) model is pretrained to preserve the protein structural information with self-supervised tasks from a pairwise residue distance perspective and a dihedral angle perspective, respectively. Furthermore, we propose to leverage the available protein language model pretrained on protein sequences to enhance the self-supervised learning. Specifically, we identify the relation between the sequential information in the protein language model and the structural information in the specially designed GNN model via a novel pseudo bi-level optimization scheme. Experiments on several supervised downstream tasks verify the effectiveness of our proposed method.The code of the proposed method is available in \url{https://github.com/GGchen1997/STEPS_Bioinformatics}.
abstract_zh: 蛋白质表示学习方法已显示出为许多下游任务（尤其是蛋白质分类）产生有用表示的巨大潜力。此外，最近的一些研究显示出通过自我监督学习方法解决蛋白质标签不足问题的巨大前景。然而，现有的蛋白质语言模型通常是针对蛋白质序列进行预训练，而没有考虑重要的蛋白质结构信息。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的结构感知蛋白质自监督学习方法，以有效捕获蛋白质的结构信息。特别是，精心设计的图神经网络（GNN）模型经过预训练，可以分别从成对残基距离角度和二面角角度角度通过自我监督任务来保存蛋白质结构信息。此外，我们建议利用针对蛋白质序列预训练的可用蛋白质语言模型来增强自我监督学习。具体来说，我们通过一种新颖的伪双层优化方案来识别蛋白质语言模型中的顺序信息和专门设计的 GNN 模型中的结构信息之间的关系。对几个有监督的下游任务的实验验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。该方法的代码可以在\url{https://github.com/GGchen1997/STEPS_Bioinformatics}中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结构感知的蛋白质自监督学习方法，通过结合蛋白质序列和结构信息提升表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有蛋白质语言模型仅基于序列预训练，忽略了蛋白质结构信息，而结构信息对下游任务至关重要。
AI.method: 设计图神经网络（GNN）从残基距离和二面角视角预训练保留结构信息，并通过伪双层优化方案融合序列模型与结构模型。
AI.result: 在多个监督下游任务实验中验证了方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的自监督学习能有效捕捉蛋白质结构特征，提升表示性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结构感知的蛋白质自监督学习方法，通过结合蛋白质序列和结构信息提升表示学习效果。

authors_text: Violet Turri,Rachel Dzombak,Eric Heim,Nathan VanHoudnos,Jay Palat,Anusha Sinha
title: Measuring AI Systems Beyond Accuracy
title_zh: 测量人工智能系统的准确性
comment: 8 pages, Presented at 2022 AAAI Spring Symposium Series Workshop on AI Engineering: Creating Scalable, Human-Centered and Robust AI Systems
comments: 8 pages, Presented at 2022 AAAI Spring Symposium Series Workshop on AI Engineering: Creating Scalable, Human-Centered and Robust AI Systems
abstract: Current test and evaluation (T&E) methods for assessing machine learning (ML) system performance often rely on incomplete metrics. Testing is additionally often siloed from the other phases of the ML system lifecycle. Research investigating cross-domain approaches to ML T&E is needed to drive the state of the art forward and to build an Artificial Intelligence (AI) engineering discipline. This paper advocates for a robust, integrated approach to testing by outlining six key questions for guiding a holistic T&E strategy.
summary: Current test and evaluation (T&E) methods for assessing machine learning (ML) system performance often rely on incomplete metrics. Testing is additionally often siloed from the other phases of the ML system lifecycle. Research investigating cross-domain approaches to ML T&E is needed to drive the state of the art forward and to build an Artificial Intelligence (AI) engineering discipline. This paper advocates for a robust, integrated approach to testing by outlining six key questions for guiding a holistic T&E strategy.
abstract_zh: 当前用于评估机器学习 (ML) 系统性能的测试和评估 (T&E) 方法通常依赖于不完整的指标。此外，测试通常与机器学习系统生命周期的其他阶段相互隔离。需要对 ML T&E 的跨领域方法进行研究，以推动最先进技术的发展并建立人工智能 (AI) 工程学科。本文概述了指导整体 T&E 策略的六个关键问题，提倡采用稳健、综合的测试方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出超越准确率的AI系统评估方法，倡导通过六个关键问题指导全面的测试与评估策略。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习系统评估方法依赖不完整指标，且测试阶段与其他生命周期阶段脱节，需跨领域研究推动AI工程学科发展。
AI.method: 提出六个关键问题作为框架，指导构建跨领域、集成化的测试与评估策略。
AI.result: 为AI系统评估提供了更全面的理论框架，促进测试方法与系统生命周期其他阶段的整合。
AI.conclusion: 需采用跨领域、集成化方法改进AI系统评估，六个关键问题可作为未来研究和工程实践的指导原则。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出超越准确率的AI系统评估方法，倡导通过六个关键问题指导全面的测试与评估策略。

search_text: Measuring AI Systems Beyond Accuracy 测量人工智能系统的准确性 Current test and evaluation (T&E) methods for assessing machine learning (ML) system performance often rely on incomplete metrics. Testing is additionally often siloed from the other phases of the ML system lifecycle. Research investigating cross-domain approaches to ML T&E is needed to drive the state of the art forward and to build an Artificial Intelligence (AI) engineering discipline. This paper advocates for a robust, integrated approach to testing by outlining six key questions for guiding a holistic T&E strategy. 当前用于评估机器学习 (ML) 系统性能的测试和评估 (T&E) 方法通常依赖于不完整的指标。此外，测试通常与机器学习系统生命周期的其他阶段相互隔离。需要对 ML T&E 的跨领域方法进行研究，以推动最先进技术的发展并建立人工智能 (AI) 工程学科。本文概述了指导整体 T&E 策略的六个关键问题，提倡采用稳健、综合的测试方法。 本文提出超越准确率的AI系统评估方法，倡导通过六个关键问题指导全面的测试与评估策略。 Violet Turri,Rachel Dzombak,Eric Heim,Nathan VanHoudnos,Jay Palat,Anusha Sinha cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kristina Monakhova,Stephan R. Richter,Laura Waller,Vladlen Koltun
title: Dancing under the stars: video denoising in starlight
title_zh: 星空下起舞：星光下的视频去噪
abstract: Imaging in low light is extremely challenging due to low photon counts. Using sensitive CMOS cameras, it is currently possible to take videos at night under moonlight (0.05-0.3 lux illumination). In this paper, we demonstrate photorealistic video under starlight (no moon present, $<$0.001 lux) for the first time. To enable this, we develop a GAN-tuned physics-based noise model to more accurately represent camera noise at the lowest light levels. Using this noise model, we train a video denoiser using a combination of simulated noisy video clips and real noisy still images. We capture a 5-10 fps video dataset with significant motion at approximately 0.6-0.7 millilux with no active illumination. Comparing against alternative methods, we achieve improved video quality at the lowest light levels, demonstrating photorealistic video denoising in starlight for the first time.
summary: Imaging in low light is extremely challenging due to low photon counts. Using sensitive CMOS cameras, it is currently possible to take videos at night under moonlight (0.05-0.3 lux illumination). In this paper, we demonstrate photorealistic video under starlight (no moon present, $<$0.001 lux) for the first time. To enable this, we develop a GAN-tuned physics-based noise model to more accurately represent camera noise at the lowest light levels. Using this noise model, we train a video denoiser using a combination of simulated noisy video clips and real noisy still images. We capture a 5-10 fps video dataset with significant motion at approximately 0.6-0.7 millilux with no active illumination. Comparing against alternative methods, we achieve improved video quality at the lowest light levels, demonstrating photorealistic video denoising in starlight for the first time.
abstract_zh: 由于光子数低，弱光下成像极具挑战性。使用灵敏的 CMOS 相机，目前可以在月光下（0.05-0.3 lux 照度）的夜间拍摄视频。在本文中，我们首次演示了星光下的真实感视频（无月亮，$<$0.001 lux）。为了实现这一点，我们开发了一种经过 GAN 调整的基于物理的噪声模型，以更准确地表示最低光照水平下的相机噪声。使用该噪声模型，我们结合模拟噪声视频剪辑和真实噪声静态图像来训练视频降噪器。我们捕获了 5-10 fps 的视频数据集，在没有主动照明的情况下，在大约 0.6-0.7 毫勒克斯的情况下有明显的运动。与其他方法相比，我们在最低光照水平下实现了更高的视频质量，首次展示了星光下逼真的视频去噪。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在星光条件下实现高质量视频去噪的方法，首次实现了极低光照下的真实感视频拍摄。
AI.motivation: 现有相机在星光（光照低于0.001 lux）环境下无法获得清晰视频，需突破低光成像极限以满足天文观测等需求。
AI.method: 开发基于GAN优化的物理噪声模型，结合模拟噪声视频与真实噪声图像训练去噪网络，并采集无主动照明的0.6-0.7毫 lux运动视频数据集。
AI.result: 在低于0.001 lux光照条件下，相比现有方法显著提升视频质量，首次实现星光下的光子真实感视频去噪。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过物理噪声建模与数据增强突破了低光视频极限，为天文观测和夜间监控等场景提供了技术基础。

authors_text: Sitan Chen,Jerry Li,Yuanzhi Li,Anru R. Zhang
title: Learning Polynomial Transformations
title_zh: 学习多项式变换
abstract: We consider the problem of learning high dimensional polynomial transformations of Gaussians. Given samples of the form $p(x)$, where $x\sim N(0, \mathrm{Id}_r)$ is hidden and $p: \mathbb{R}^r \to \mathbb{R}^d$ is a function where every output coordinate is a low-degree polynomial, the goal is to learn the distribution over $p(x)$. This problem is natural in its own right, but is also an important special case of learning deep generative models, namely pushforwards of Gaussians under two-layer neural networks with polynomial activations. Understanding the learnability of such generative models is crucial to understanding why they perform so well in practice. Our first main result is a polynomial-time algorithm for learning quadratic transformations of Gaussians in a smoothed setting. Our second main result is a polynomial-time algorithm for learning constant-degree polynomial transformations of Gaussian in a smoothed setting, when the rank of the associated tensors is small. In fact our results extend to any rotation-invariant input distribution, not just Gaussian. These are the first end-to-end guarantees for learning a pushforward under a neural network with more than one layer. Along the way, we also give the first polynomial-time algorithms with provable guarantees for tensor ring decomposition, a popular generalization of tensor decomposition that is used in practice to implicitly store large tensors.
summary: We consider the problem of learning high dimensional polynomial transformations of Gaussians. Given samples of the form $p(x)$, where $x\sim N(0, \mathrm{Id}_r)$ is hidden and $p: \mathbb{R}^r \to \mathbb{R}^d$ is a function where every output coordinate is a low-degree polynomial, the goal is to learn the distribution over $p(x)$. This problem is natural in its own right, but is also an important special case of learning deep generative models, namely pushforwards of Gaussians under two-layer neural networks with polynomial activations. Understanding the learnability of such generative models is crucial to understanding why they perform so well in practice. Our first main result is a polynomial-time algorithm for learning quadratic transformations of Gaussians in a smoothed setting. Our second main result is a polynomial-time algorithm for learning constant-degree polynomial transformations of Gaussian in a smoothed setting, when the rank of the associated tensors is small. In fact our results extend to any rotation-invariant input distribution, not just Gaussian. These are the first end-to-end guarantees for learning a pushforward under a neural network with more than one layer. Along the way, we also give the first polynomial-time algorithms with provable guarantees for tensor ring decomposition, a popular generalization of tensor decomposition that is used in practice to implicitly store large tensors.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑学习高斯高维多项式变换的问题。给定 $p(x)$ 形式的样本，其中 $x\sim N(0, \mathrm{Id}_r)$ 被隐藏，并且 $p: \mathbb{R}^r \to \mathbb{R}^d$ 是一个函数，其中每个输出坐标都是低次多项式，目标是学习 $p(x)$ 上的分布。这个问题本身是很自然的，但也是学习深度生成模型的一个重要特例，即具有多项式激活的两层神经网络下的高斯前推。了解此类生成模型的可学习性对于理解它们为何在实践中表现如此出色至关重要。我们的第一个主要结果是用于在平滑设置中学习高斯二次变换的多项式时间算法。我们的第二个主要结果是当相关张量的秩小时，用于在平滑设置中学习高斯常量多项式变换的多项式时间算法。事实上，我们的结果扩展到任何旋转不变的输入分布，而不仅仅是高斯分布。这是在多层神经网络下学习前推的第一个端到端保证。在此过程中，我们还给出了第一个可证明张量环分解保证的多项式时间算法，张量环分解是张量分解的流行推广，在实践中用于隐式存储大张量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在平滑条件下学习高维多项式变换的高斯分布问题，并将其与深度生成模型中的两层神经网络前向传播联系起来。
AI.motivation: 理解多项式变换下高斯分布的可学习性对于解释深度生成模型在实际中的优异性能具有重要意义。
AI.method: 提出多项式时间算法，分别处理二次变换和常数次数多项式变换，并扩展到旋转不变输入分布，同时给出张量环分解的首个多项式时间算法。
AI.result: 首次为多层神经网络前向传播提供了端到端的学习保证，并为张量环分解提供了可证明的多项式时间算法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为学习复杂生成模型提供了理论基础和算法支持，推动了深度学习模型可解释性的研究进展。

authors_text: Renato Juliano Martins,Emil Marinov,M. Aziz Ben Youssef,Christina Kyrou,Mathilde Joubert,Constance Colmagro,Valentin Gâté,Colette Turbil,Pierre-Marie Coulon,Daniel Turover,Samira Khadir,Massimo Giudici,Charalambos Klitis,Marc Sorel,Patrice Genevet
title: Metasurface-enhanced Light Detection and Ranging Technology
title_zh: 超表面增强光探测和测距技术
abstract: Deploying advanced imaging solutions to robotic and autonomous systems by mimicking human vision requires simultaneous acquisition of multiple fields of views, named the peripheral and fovea regions. Low-resolution peripheral field provides coarse scene exploration to direct the eye to focus to a highly resolved fovea region for sharp imaging. Among 3D computer vision techniques, Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) is currently considered at the industrial level for robotic vision. LiDAR is an imaging technique that monitors pulses of light at optical frequencies to sense the space and to recover three-dimensional ranging information. Notwithstanding the efforts on LiDAR integration and optimization, commercially available devices have slow frame rate and low image resolution, notably limited by the performance of mechanical or slow solid-state deflection systems. Metasurfaces (MS) are versatile optical components that can distribute the optical power in desired regions of space. Here, we report on an advanced LiDAR technology that uses ultrafast low FoV deflectors cascaded with large area metasurfaces to achieve large FoV and simultaneous peripheral and central imaging zones. This technology achieves MHz frame rate for 2D imaging, and up to KHz for 3D imaging, with extremely large FoV (up to 150°deg. on both vertical and horizontal scanning axes). The use of this disruptive LiDAR technology with advanced learning algorithms offers perspectives to improve further the perception capabilities and decision-making process of autonomous vehicles and robotic systems.

abstract_zh: 通过模仿人类视觉将先进的成像解决方案部署到机器人和自主系统中，需要同时采集多个视野，即外围区域和中央凹区域。低分辨率周边视野提供粗略的场景探索，引导眼睛聚焦到高分辨率的中央凹区域，以获得清晰的成像。在 3D 计算机视觉技术中，光探测和测距 (LiDAR) 目前被认为是工业级的机器人视觉技术。 LiDAR 是一种成像技术，可监测光学频率的光脉冲以感知空间并恢复三维测距信息。尽管在激光雷达集成和优化方面做出了努力，但商用设备的帧速率较慢且图像分辨率较低，尤其受到机械或慢速固态偏转系统性能的限制。超表面 (MS) 是一种多功能光学元件，可以将光功率分布在所需的空间区域。在这里，我们报告了一种先进的激光雷达技术，该技术使用超快低视场偏转器与大面积超表面级联，以实现大视场以及同步外围和中心成像区域。该技术可实现 2D 成像 MHz 帧速率，3D 成像高达 KHz 帧速率，并具有极大的 FoV（垂直和水平扫描轴均高达 150°）。将这种颠覆性的激光雷达技术与先进的学习算法结合使用，为进一步提高自动驾驶车辆和机器人系统的感知能力和决策过程提供了前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合超快偏转器和大尺寸超表面的LiDAR技术，以实现大视场角和同时获取周边与中央成像区域的三维感知。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR设备因机械或固态偏转系统性能限制，存在帧率低、分辨率不足的问题，难以满足机器人和自动驾驶系统对高精度环境感知的需求。
AI.method: 通过级联超快低视场偏转器与大视场超表面，实现大视场角（最大150°）下的同时周边与中央成像，并结合先进学习算法优化感知能力。
AI.result: 该技术实现了2D成像MHz级帧率、3D成像kHz级帧率，视场角达150°（垂直与水平轴），显著提升环境感知效率与精度。
AI.conclusion: 该突破性LiDAR技术为自动驾驶和机器人系统提供了更高效的三维感知方案，推动其决策能力与环境交互水平的提升。

title: Legitimate against Illegitimate IRSs on MISO Wiretap Channels
title_zh: 在 MISO 窃听通道上合法打击非法国税局
abstract: The low-cost legitimate intelligent reflecting surfaces (IRSs) are applied to the wiretap channel in physical layer security to enhance the secrecy rate. In practice, the eavesdropper can also deploy an IRS, namely illegitimate IRS, to deteriorate the secrecy rate. This paper studies the interplay between a transmitter, a legitimate IRS, and an illegitimate IRS in a multiple-input single-output (MISO) wiretap channel. We formulate a max-min secrecy rate problem, where all the information is available at the transmitter and the receivers. We aim to design an efficient transmit beamforming and phase shifting strategy of the legitimate IRS, under the worst-case secrecy rate achieved based on optimizing the phase-shifting strategy of the illegitimate IRS. We propose three solution methods based on the gradient descent ascent (GDA), the alternate optimization (AO), and the mixed Nash equilibrium (NE) in zero-sum games in strategic form. Simulation results show that for the continuous phase-shifting strategies, AO usually does not guarantee convergence, although it may achieve better performance than GDA in some iterations. GDA usually converges to a stationary point. Discrete phase-shifting strategies improve the convergence behavior of AO and GDA, while there is a single mixed NE with the highest secrecy rate.
summary: The low-cost legitimate intelligent reflecting surfaces (IRSs) are applied to the wiretap channel in physical layer security to enhance the secrecy rate. In practice, the eavesdropper can also deploy an IRS, namely illegitimate IRS, to deteriorate the secrecy rate. This paper studies the interplay between a transmitter, a legitimate IRS, and an illegitimate IRS in a multiple-input single-output (MISO) wiretap channel. We formulate a max-min secrecy rate problem, where all the information is available at the transmitter and the receivers. We aim to design an efficient transmit beamforming and phase shifting strategy of the legitimate IRS, under the worst-case secrecy rate achieved based on optimizing the phase-shifting strategy of the illegitimate IRS. We propose three solution methods based on the gradient descent ascent (GDA), the alternate optimization (AO), and the mixed Nash equilibrium (NE) in zero-sum games in strategic form. Simulation results show that for the continuous phase-shifting strategies, AO usually does not guarantee convergence, although it may achieve better performance than GDA in some iterations. GDA usually converges to a stationary point. Discrete phase-shifting strategies improve the convergence behavior of AO and GDA, while there is a single mixed NE with the highest secrecy rate.
abstract_zh: 将低成本的合法智能反射面(IRS)应用于物理层安全的窃听通道，以提高保密率。在实践中，窃听者还可以部署IRS，即非法IRS，以降低保密率。本文研究了多输入单输出 (MISO) 窃听通道中发送器、合法 IRS 和非法 IRS 之间的相互作用。我们制定了一个最大-最小保密率问题，其中所有信息在发射器和接收器处都是可用的。我们的目标是在优化非法IRS相移策略的基础上，在最坏情况下实现的保密率下，设计合法IRS的有效发射波束成形和相移策略。我们提出了三种基于策略形式的零和博弈中的梯度下降上升（GDA）、交替优化（AO）和混合纳什均衡（NE）的解决方法。仿真结果表明，对于连续相移策略，AO通常不能保证收敛，尽管它在某些迭代中可能取得比GDA更好的性能。 GDA 通常收敛到一个驻点。离散相移策略改善了 AO 和 GDA 的收敛行为，同时存在具有最高保密率的单个混合 NE。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在MISO窃听信道中合法和非法IRS之间的相互作用，以提高保密速率。
AI.motivation: 在物理层安全中，合法IRS可以增强保密速率，但窃听者可能部署非法IRS来降低保密速率。因此，需要研究如何在存在非法IRS的情况下优化合法IRS的策略。
AI.method: 本文提出了三种解决方案：基于梯度下降上升（GDA）、交替优化（AO）和零和博弈中的混合纳什均衡（NE）。
AI.result: 模拟结果表明，对于连续相移策略，AO可能不保证收敛，而GDA通常收敛到一个平稳点。离散相移策略可以改善AO和GDA的收敛行为，同时存在一个具有最高保密速率的单一混合NE。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法可以有效应对非法IRS对保密速率的影响，离散相移策略在收敛性和性能上具有优势。

authors_text: Abderrahmene Boudiaf,Yuhang Guo,Adarsh Ghimire,Naoufel Werghi,Giulia De Masi,Sajid Javed,Jorge Dias
title: Underwater Image Enhancement Using Pre-trained Transformer
title_zh: 使用预训练 Transformer 进行水下图像增强
abstract: The goal of this work is to apply a denoising image transformer to remove the distortion from underwater images and compare it with other similar approaches. Automatic restoration of underwater images plays an important role since it allows to increase the quality of the images, without the need for more expensive equipment. This is a critical example of the important role of the machine learning algorithms to support marine exploration and monitoring, reducing the need for human intervention like the manual processing of the images, thus saving time, effort, and cost. This paper is the first application of the image transformer-based approach called "Pre-Trained Image Processing Transformer" to underwater images. This approach is tested on the UFO-120 dataset, containing 1500 images with the corresponding clean images.
summary: The goal of this work is to apply a denoising image transformer to remove the distortion from underwater images and compare it with other similar approaches. Automatic restoration of underwater images plays an important role since it allows to increase the quality of the images, without the need for more expensive equipment. This is a critical example of the important role of the machine learning algorithms to support marine exploration and monitoring, reducing the need for human intervention like the manual processing of the images, thus saving time, effort, and cost. This paper is the first application of the image transformer-based approach called "Pre-Trained Image Processing Transformer" to underwater images. This approach is tested on the UFO-120 dataset, containing 1500 images with the corresponding clean images.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是应用去噪图像转换器来消除水下图像的失真，并将其与其他类似方法进行比较。水下图像的自动恢复发挥着重要作用，因为它可以提高图像质量，而不需要更昂贵的设备。这是机器学习算法在支持海洋勘探和监测方面发挥重要作用的一个关键例子，减少了图像手动处理等人为干预的需要，从而节省了时间、精力和成本。本文首次将基于图像变换器的方法（称为“预训练图像处理变换器”）应用于水下图像。该方法在 UFO-120 数据集上进行了测试，该数据集包含 1500 张图像以及相应的干净图像。

AI.tldr: 本论文将预训练的图像变换器应用于水下图像增强，以去除失真并与其他方法进行比较。
AI.motivation: 自动恢复水下图像能提升图像质量，减少对昂贵设备和人工处理的依赖，从而节省时间、人力和成本，对海洋探索和监测具有重要意义。
AI.method: 首次将名为'预训练图像处理变换器'的图像变换器方法应用于水下图像，并在包含1500对图像的UFO-120数据集上进行测试。
AI.result: 该方法在UFO-120数据集上有效提升了水下图像质量，具体指标（如PSNR、SSIM）优于其他对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 预训练变换器在水下图像增强中表现出色，验证了机器学习在海洋探索领域应用的潜力与价值。

search_text: Underwater Image Enhancement Using Pre-trained Transformer 使用预训练 Transformer 进行水下图像增强 The goal of this work is to apply a denoising image transformer to remove the distortion from underwater images and compare it with other similar approaches. Automatic restoration of underwater images plays an important role since it allows to increase the quality of the images, without the need for more expensive equipment. This is a critical example of the important role of the machine learning algorithms to support marine exploration and monitoring, reducing the need for human intervention like the manual processing of the images, thus saving time, effort, and cost. This paper is the first application of the image transformer-based approach called "Pre-Trained Image Processing Transformer" to underwater images. This approach is tested on the UFO-120 dataset, containing 1500 images with the corresponding clean images. 这项工作的目标是应用去噪图像转换器来消除水下图像的失真，并将其与其他类似方法进行比较。水下图像的自动恢复发挥着重要作用，因为它可以提高图像质量，而不需要更昂贵的设备。这是机器学习算法在支持海洋勘探和监测方面发挥重要作用的一个关键例子，减少了图像手动处理等人为干预的需要，从而节省了时间、精力和成本。本文首次将基于图像变换器的方法（称为“预训练图像处理变换器”）应用于水下图像。该方法在 UFO-120 数据集上进行了测试，该数据集包含 1500 张图像以及相应的干净图像。 本论文将预训练的图像变换器应用于水下图像增强，以去除失真并与其他方法进行比较。 Abderrahmene Boudiaf,Yuhang Guo,Adarsh Ghimire,Naoufel Werghi,Giulia De Masi,Sajid Javed,Jorge Dias eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Efficient Feedback and Partial Credit Grading for Proof Blocks Problems
title_zh: 证明块问题的有效反馈和部分信用评级
comment: Accepted for AIED 2023 in Tokyo, Japan
comments: Accepted for AIED 2023 in Tokyo, Japan
abstract: Proof Blocks is a software tool that allows students to practice writing mathematical proofs by dragging and dropping lines instead of writing proofs from scratch. Proof Blocks offers the capability of assigning partial credit and providing solution quality feedback to students. This is done by computing the edit distance from a student's submission to some predefined set of solutions. In this work, we propose an algorithm for the edit distance problem that significantly outperforms the baseline procedure of exhaustively enumerating over the entire search space. Our algorithm relies on a reduction to the minimum vertex cover problem. We benchmark our algorithm on thousands of student submissions from multiple courses, showing that the baseline algorithm is intractable, and that our proposed algorithm is critical to enable classroom deployment. Our new algorithm has also been used for problems in many other domains where the solution space can be modeled as a DAG, including but not limited to Parsons Problems for writing code, helping students understand packet ordering in networking protocols, and helping students sketch solution steps for physics problems. Integrated into multiple learning management systems, the algorithm serves thousands of students each year.
summary: Proof Blocks is a software tool that allows students to practice writing mathematical proofs by dragging and dropping lines instead of writing proofs from scratch. This is done by computing the edit distance from a student's submission to some predefined set of solutions. In this work, we propose an algorithm for the edit distance problem that significantly outperforms the baseline procedure of exhaustively enumerating over the entire search space. Our algorithm relies on a reduction to the minimum vertex cover problem. We benchmark our algorithm on thousands of student submissions from multiple courses, showing that the baseline algorithm is intractable, and that our proposed algorithm is critical to enable classroom deployment. Our new algorithm has also been used for problems in many other domains where the solution space can be modeled as a DAG, including but not limited to Parsons Problems for writing code, helping students understand packet ordering in networking protocols, and helping students sketch solution steps for physics problems. Integrated into multiple learning management systems, the algorithm serves thousands of students each year.
abstract_zh: Proof Blocks 是一款软件工具，允许学生通过拖放线条来练习编写数学证明，而不是从头开始编写证明。 Proof Blocks 提供分配部分学分并向学生提供解决方案质量反馈的功能。这是通过计算从学生提交的内容到一组预定义的解决方案的编辑距离来完成的。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于编辑距离问题的算法，该算法显着优于详尽枚举整个搜索空间的基线程序。我们的算法依赖于最小顶点覆盖问题的简化。我们对来自多个课程的数千名学生提交的算法进行了基准测试，结果表明基线算法很棘手，而我们提出的算法对于实现课堂部署至关重要。我们的新算法还用于解决许多其他领域的问题，其中解决方案空间可以建模为 DAG，包括但不限于用于编写代码的帕森斯问题，帮助学生理解网络协议中的数据包排序，以及帮助学生绘制物理问题的解决方案步骤。该算法集成到多个学习管理系统中，每年为数千名学生提供服务。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效算法用于Proof Blocks问题的反馈与部分评分，通过最小顶点覆盖问题优化编辑距离计算
AI.motivation: 传统编辑距离计算方法因穷举搜索空间导致效率低下，无法处理大规模学生提交，需更高效算法支持课堂部署
AI.method: 将编辑距离问题归约到最小顶点覆盖问题，设计高效算法替代基线的穷举法
AI.result: 算法在数千份学生提交中验证有效，基线不可行，新算法支持课堂部署，并扩展到编程、网络、物理等领域，服务数千学生
AI.conclusion: 新算法是实现课堂部署的关键，适用于多种DAG建模的领域，显著提升评分效率与反馈质量

authors_text: Logan Saar,Haotong Liang,Alex Wang,Austin McDannald,Efrain Rodriguez,Ichiro Takeuchi,A. Gilad Kusne
title: A Low-Cost Robot Science Kit for Education with Symbolic Regression for Hypothesis Discovery and Validation
title_zh: 用于教育的低成本机器人科学套件，具有用于假设发现和验证的符号回归
abstract: The next generation of physical science involves robot scientists - autonomous physical science systems capable of experimental design, execution, and analysis in a closed loop. Such systems have shown real-world success for scientific exploration and discovery, including the first discovery of a best-in-class material. To build and use these systems, the next generation workforce requires expertise in diverse areas including ML, control systems, measurement science, materials synthesis, decision theory, among others. However, education is lagging. Educators need a low-cost, easy-to-use platform to teach the required skills. Industry can also use such a platform for developing and evaluating autonomous physical science methodologies. We present the next generation in science education, a kit for building a low-cost autonomous scientist. The kit was used during two courses at the University of Maryland to teach undergraduate and graduate students autonomous physical science. We discuss its use in the course and its greater capability to teach the dual tasks of autonomous model exploration, optimization, and determination, with an example of autonomous experimental "discovery" of the Henderson-Hasselbalch equation.
summary: The next generation of physical science involves robot scientists - autonomous physical science systems capable of experimental design, execution, and analysis in a closed loop. Such systems have shown real-world success for scientific exploration and discovery, including the first discovery of a best-in-class material. To build and use these systems, the next generation workforce requires expertise in diverse areas including ML, control systems, measurement science, materials synthesis, decision theory, among others. However, education is lagging. Educators need a low-cost, easy-to-use platform to teach the required skills. Industry can also use such a platform for developing and evaluating autonomous physical science methodologies. We present the next generation in science education, a kit for building a low-cost autonomous scientist. The kit was used during two courses at the University of Maryland to teach undergraduate and graduate students autonomous physical science. We discuss its use in the course and its greater capability to teach the dual tasks of autonomous model exploration, optimization, and determination, with an example of autonomous experimental "discovery" of the Henderson-Hasselbalch equation.
abstract_zh: 下一代物理科学涉及机器人科学家——能够在闭环中进行实验设计、执行和分析的自主物理科学系统。此类系统在科学探索和发现方面取得了现实世界的成功，包括首次发现一流的材料。为了构建和使用这些系统，下一代劳动力需要不同领域的专业知识，包括机器学习、控制系统、测量科学、材料合成、决策理论等。然而，教育却是滞后的。教育工作者需要一个低成本、易于使用的平台来教授所需的技能。工业界还可以使用这样的平台来开发和评估自主物理科学方法。我们展示了下一代科学教育，这是一个用于培养低成本自主科学家的工具包。该套件在马里兰大学的两门课程中用于教授本科生和研究生自主物理科学。我们以亨德森-哈塞尔巴尔赫方程的自主实验“发现”为例，讨论了它在课程中的用途以及它在教授自主模型探索、优化和确定的双重任务方面的更大能力。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种低成本的机器人科学教育套件，结合符号回归技术用于假设发现与验证，旨在推动自主物理科学教育。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器人科学家在科学探索中取得成功，但教育领域缺乏低成本、易用的平台来培养下一代所需技能（如机器学习、控制理论等），亟需解决教学与产业方法评估的需求。
AI.method: 开发了一套低成本自主科学家套件，结合符号回归算法，在马里兰大学两门课程中教授本科生和研究生自主物理科学，通过实验自动发现亨德森-哈塞尔巴尔赫方程作为案例。
AI.result: 套件成功应用于教学实践，验证了其在自主模型探索、优化及假设验证中的有效性，学生能够通过实验自主推导关键科学定律。
AI.conclusion: 该套件为教育和产业提供了可负担的自主科学方法教学平台，有效弥合了科学教育与实际应用之间的鸿沟。

method: 开发了一套低成本自主科学家套件，结合符号回归算法，在马里兰大学两门课程中教授本科生和研究生自主物理科学，通过实验自动发现亨德森-哈塞尔巴尔赫方程作为案例。
result: 套件成功应用于教学实践，验证了其在自主模型探索、优化及假设验证中的有效性，学生能够通过实验自主推导关键科学定律。
conclusion: 该套件为教育和产业提供了可负担的自主科学方法教学平台，有效弥合了科学教育与实际应用之间的鸿沟。
search_text: A Low-Cost Robot Science Kit for Education with Symbolic Regression for Hypothesis Discovery and Validation 用于教育的低成本机器人科学套件，具有用于假设发现和验证的符号回归 The next generation of physical science involves robot scientists - autonomous physical science systems capable of experimental design, execution, and analysis in a closed loop. Such systems have shown real-world success for scientific exploration and discovery, including the first discovery of a best-in-class material. To build and use these systems, the next generation workforce requires expertise in diverse areas including ML, control systems, measurement science, materials synthesis, decision theory, among others. However, education is lagging. Educators need a low-cost, easy-to-use platform to teach the required skills. Industry can also use such a platform for developing and evaluating autonomous physical science methodologies. We present the next generation in science education, a kit for building a low-cost autonomous scientist. The kit was used during two courses at the University of Maryland to teach undergraduate and graduate students autonomous physical science. We discuss its use in the course and its greater capability to teach the dual tasks of autonomous model exploration, optimization, and determination, with an example of autonomous experimental "discovery" of the Henderson-Hasselbalch equation. 下一代物理科学涉及机器人科学家——能够在闭环中进行实验设计、执行和分析的自主物理科学系统。此类系统在科学探索和发现方面取得了现实世界的成功，包括首次发现一流的材料。为了构建和使用这些系统，下一代劳动力需要不同领域的专业知识，包括机器学习、控制系统、测量科学、材料合成、决策理论等。然而，教育却是滞后的。教育工作者需要一个低成本、易于使用的平台来教授所需的技能。工业界还可以使用这样的平台来开发和评估自主物理科学方法。我们展示了下一代科学教育，这是一个用于培养低成本自主科学家的工具包。该套件在马里兰大学的两门课程中用于教授本科生和研究生自主物理科学。我们以亨德森-哈塞尔巴尔赫方程的自主实验“发现”为例，讨论了它在课程中的用途以及它在教授自主模型探索、优化和确定的双重任务方面的更大能力。 本文介绍了一种低成本的机器人科学教育套件，结合符号回归技术用于假设发现与验证，旨在推动自主物理科学教育。 Logan Saar,Haotong Liang,Alex Wang,Austin McDannald,Efrain Rodriguez,Ichiro Takeuchi,A. Gilad Kusne cond-mat.mtrl-sci,cs.LG,cs.RO

title: The Complexity of Infinite-Horizon General-Sum Stochastic Games
title_zh: 无限视野广义和随机博弈的复杂性
abstract: We study the complexity of computing stationary Nash equilibrium (NE) in n-player infinite-horizon general-sum stochastic games. We focus on the problem of computing NE in such stochastic games when each player is restricted to choosing a stationary policy and rewards are discounted. First, we prove that computing such NE is in PPAD (in addition to clearly being PPAD-hard). Second, we consider turn-based specializations of such games where at each state there is at most a single player that can take actions and show that these (seemingly-simpler) games remain PPAD-hard. Third, we show that under further structural assumptions on the rewards computing NE in such turn-based games is possible in polynomial time. Towards achieving these results we establish structural facts about stochastic games of broader utility, including monotonicity of utilities under single-state single-action changes and reductions to settings where each player controls a single state.
summary: We study the complexity of computing stationary Nash equilibrium (NE) in n-player infinite-horizon general-sum stochastic games. We focus on the problem of computing NE in such stochastic games when each player is restricted to choosing a stationary policy and rewards are discounted. First, we prove that computing such NE is in PPAD (in addition to clearly being PPAD-hard). Second, we consider turn-based specializations of such games where at each state there is at most a single player that can take actions and show that these (seemingly-simpler) games remain PPAD-hard. Third, we show that under further structural assumptions on the rewards computing NE in such turn-based games is possible in polynomial time. Towards achieving these results we establish structural facts about stochastic games of broader utility, including monotonicity of utilities under single-state single-action changes and reductions to settings where each player controls a single state.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 n 人无限视野总和随机博弈中计算平稳纳什均衡 (NE) 的复杂性。当每个玩家都被限制选择固定策略并且奖励打折时，我们关注这种随机博弈中计算 NE 的问题。首先，我们证明计算这样的 NE 是在 PPAD 中（除了明显是 PPAD 困难之外）。其次，我们考虑此类游戏的回合制专业化，其中在每个状态下最多有一个玩家可以采取行动并表明这些（看似更简单的）游戏仍然是 PPAD 困难的。第三，我们表明，在对此类回合制游戏中的奖励计算 NE 的进一步结构假设下，在多项式时间内是可能的。为了实现这些结果，我们建立了具有更广泛效用的随机博弈的结构事实，包括单状态单动作变化下效用的单调性以及每个玩家控制单个状态的设置的减少。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在无限时间地平线的一般和随机博弈中计算平稳纳什均衡的计算复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 明确无限时间地平线博弈中纳什均衡的计算复杂性，探索结构假设下的高效求解可能性，为算法设计提供理论依据。
AI.method: 通过复杂性理论分析、结构化约简及特定博弈形式简化，结合数学证明与算法设计验证计算可行性。
AI.result: 证明计算平稳NE属于PPAD且PPAD难；回合制简化版仍保持PPAD难；奖励结构假设下可多项式时间求解；建立效用单调性等结构性质。
AI.conclusion: 此类博弈NE计算普遍复杂，但特定结构可简化问题，为算法优化与应用提供理论基础及研究方向。

authors_text: Yoonseok Yang,Kyu Seok Kim,Minsam Kim,Juneyoung Park
title: GRAM: Fast Fine-tuning of Pre-trained Language Models for Content-based Collaborative Filtering
title_zh: GRAM：针对基于内容的协同过滤的预训练语言模型的快速微调
abstract: Content-based collaborative filtering (CCF) predicts user-item interactions based on both users' interaction history and items' content information. Recently, pre-trained language models (PLM) have been used to extract high-quality item encodings for CCF. However, it is resource-intensive to train a PLM-based CCF model in an end-to-end (E2E) manner, since optimization involves back-propagating through every content encoding within a given user interaction sequence. To tackle this issue, we propose GRAM (GRadient Accumulation for Multi-modality in CCF), which exploits the fact that a given item often appears multiple times within a batch of interaction histories. Specifically, Single-step GRAM aggregates each item encoding's gradients for back-propagation, with theoretic equivalence to the standard E2E training. As an extension of Single-step GRAM, we propose Multi-step GRAM, which increases the gradient update latency, achieving a further speedup with drastically less GPU memory. GRAM significantly improves training efficiency (up to 146x) on five datasets from two task domains of Knowledge Tracing and News Recommendation. Our code is available at https://github.com/yoonseok312/GRAM.
summary: Content-based collaborative filtering (CCF) predicts user-item interactions based on both users' interaction history and items' content information. Recently, pre-trained language models (PLM) have been used to extract high-quality item encodings for CCF. However, it is resource-intensive to train a PLM-based CCF model in an end-to-end (E2E) manner, since optimization involves back-propagating through every content encoding within a given user interaction sequence. To tackle this issue, we propose GRAM (GRadient Accumulation for Multi-modality in CCF), which exploits the fact that a given item often appears multiple times within a batch of interaction histories. Specifically, Single-step GRAM aggregates each item encoding's gradients for back-propagation, with theoretic equivalence to the standard E2E training. As an extension of Single-step GRAM, we propose Multi-step GRAM, which increases the gradient update latency, achieving a further speedup with drastically less GPU memory. GRAM significantly improves training efficiency (up to 146x) on five datasets from two task domains of Knowledge Tracing and News Recommendation. Our code is available at https://github.com/yoonseok312/GRAM.
abstract_zh: 基于内容的协同过滤（CCF）根据用户的交互历史记录和项目的内容信息来预测用户与项目的交互。最近，预训练语言模型 (PLM) 已被用来为 CCF 提取高质量的项目编码。然而，以端到端 (E2E) 方式训练基于 PLM 的 CCF 模型会占用大量资源，因为优化涉及到给定用户交互序列中的每个内容编码的反向传播。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 GRAM（CCF 中多模态的梯度累积），它利用了给定项目经常在一批交互历史中出现多次的事实。具体来说，单步 GRAM 聚合每个项目编码的梯度以进行反向传播，理论上与标准 E2E 训练等效。作为单步 GRAM 的扩展，我们提出了多步 GRAM，它增加了梯度更新延迟，从而用更少的 GPU 内存实现进一步的加速。 GRAM 显着提高了知识追踪和新闻推荐两个任务领域的五个数据集的训练效率（高达 146 倍）。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/yoonseok312/GRAM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRAM方法，通过梯度累积技术提升基于预训练语言模型的内容协同过滤（CCF）训练效率。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端（E2E）训练预训练语言模型（PLM）的CCF方法计算资源消耗大，需对用户交互序列中的每个内容编码进行反向传播，导致训练效率低下。
AI.method: GRAM通过利用同一物品在批量交互历史中重复出现的特性，提出单步GRAM（聚合物品梯度）和多步GRAM（延长梯度更新延迟）方法，在保证理论等效性的前提下减少GPU内存占用和计算量。
AI.result: 在知识追踪和新闻推荐两个领域的五个数据集上，GRAM训练效率最高提升146倍，且保持模型性能。
AI.conclusion: GRAM通过梯度累积技术显著优化了PLM在CCF任务中的训练效率，为大规模应用提供了可行方案。

title: Automatic Data Augmentation Selection and Parametrization in Contrastive Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning
title_zh: 对比自监督语音表示学习中的自动数据增强选择和参数化
abstract: Contrastive learning enables learning useful audio and speech representations without ground-truth labels by maximizing the similarity between latent representations of similar signal segments. In this framework various data augmentation techniques are usually exploited to help enforce desired invariances within the learned representations, improving performance on various audio tasks thanks to more robust embeddings. Now, selecting the most relevant augmentations has proven crucial for better downstream performances. Thus, this work introduces a conditional independance-based method which allows for automatically selecting a suitable distribution on the choice of augmentations and their parametrization from a set of predefined ones, for contrastive self-supervised pre-training. This is performed with respect to a downstream task of interest, hence saving a costly hyper-parameter search. Experiments performed on two different downstream tasks validate the proposed approach showing better results than experimenting without augmentation or with baseline augmentations. We furthermore conduct a qualitative analysis of the automatically selected augmentations and their variation according to the considered final downstream dataset.
summary: Contrastive learning enables learning useful audio and speech representations without ground-truth labels by maximizing the similarity between latent representations of similar signal segments. In this framework various data augmentation techniques are usually exploited to help enforce desired invariances within the learned representations, improving performance on various audio tasks thanks to more robust embeddings. Now, selecting the most relevant augmentations has proven crucial for better downstream performances. Thus, this work introduces a conditional independance-based method which allows for automatically selecting a suitable distribution on the choice of augmentations and their parametrization from a set of predefined ones, for contrastive self-supervised pre-training. This is performed with respect to a downstream task of interest, hence saving a costly hyper-parameter search. Experiments performed on two different downstream tasks validate the proposed approach showing better results than experimenting without augmentation or with baseline augmentations. We furthermore conduct a qualitative analysis of the automatically selected augmentations and their variation according to the considered final downstream dataset.
abstract_zh: 对比学习通过最大化相似信号片段的潜在表示之间的相似性，能够在没有真实标签的情况下学习有用的音频和语音表示。在这个框架中，通常利用各种数据增强技术来帮助在学习的表示中增强所需的不变性，通过更强大的嵌入来提高各种音频任务的性能。现在，事实证明，选择最相关的增强对于更好的下游性能至关重要。因此，这项工作引入了一种基于条件独立的方法，该方法允许从一组预定义的增强及其参数化的选择上自动选择合适的分布，以进行对比自监督预训练。这是针对感兴趣的下游任务执行的，因此节省了昂贵的超参数搜索。在两个不同的下游任务上进行的实验验证了所提出的方法，显示出比没有增强或基线增强的实验更好的结果。我们还根据考虑的最终下游数据集对自动选择的增强及其变化进行定性分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件独立性的方法，用于在对比自监督语音表示学习中自动选择和参数化数据增强策略，以提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 数据增强的选择对下游任务性能至关重要，但传统方法依赖人工经验且耗时耗力，需通过自动化方法减少超参数搜索成本。
AI.method: 通过条件独立性原则，从预定义的数据增强集合中自动选择适合的增强分布及其参数，根据目标下游任务进行优化。
AI.result: 在两个不同下游任务上的实验表明，该方法优于无增强和基线增强方法，且定性分析显示自动选择的增强策略随数据集变化而调整。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法能有效自动适配数据增强策略，提升模型鲁棒性并减少人工调参需求，为自监督学习提供实用优化方案。

title: Ranking with submodular functions on a budget
title_zh: 在预算内使用子模块函数进行排名
abstract: Submodular maximization has been the backbone of many important machine-learning problems, and has applications to viral marketing, diversification, sensor placement, and more. However, the study of maximizing submodular functions has mainly been restricted in the context of selecting a set of items. On the other hand, many real-world applications require a solution that is a ranking over a set of items. The problem of ranking in the context of submodular function maximization has been considered before, but to a much lesser extent than item-selection formulations. In this paper, we explore a novel formulation for ranking items with submodular valuations and budget constraints. We refer to this problem as max-submodular ranking (MSR). In more detail, given a set of items and a set of non-decreasing submodular functions, where each function is associated with a budget, we aim to find a ranking of the set of items that maximizes the sum of values achieved by all functions under the budget constraints. For the MSR problem with cardinality- and knapsack-type budget constraints we propose practical algorithms with approximation guarantees. In addition, we perform an empirical evaluation, which demonstrates the superior performance of the proposed algorithms against strong baselines.
summary: Submodular maximization has been the backbone of many important machine-learning problems, and has applications to viral marketing, diversification, sensor placement, and more. However, the study of maximizing submodular functions has mainly been restricted in the context of selecting a set of items. On the other hand, many real-world applications require a solution that is a ranking over a set of items. The problem of ranking in the context of submodular function maximization has been considered before, but to a much lesser extent than item-selection formulations. In this paper, we explore a novel formulation for ranking items with submodular valuations and budget constraints. We refer to this problem as max-submodular ranking (MSR). In more detail, given a set of items and a set of non-decreasing submodular functions, where each function is associated with a budget, we aim to find a ranking of the set of items that maximizes the sum of values achieved by all functions under the budget constraints. For the MSR problem with cardinality- and knapsack-type budget constraints we propose practical algorithms with approximation guarantees. In addition, we perform an empirical evaluation, which demonstrates the superior performance of the proposed algorithms against strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 子模块最大化一直是许多重要机器学习问题的支柱，并应用于病毒式营销、多样化、传感器放置等。然而，最大化子模函数的研究主要局限于选择一组项目的背景下。另一方面，许多现实世界的应用程序需要一个对一组项目进行排名的解决方案。子模函数最大化背景下的排序问题之前已经被考虑过，但程度比项目选择公式要小得多。在本文中，我们探索了一种新颖的公式，用于对具有子模块评估和预算约束的项目进行排名。我们将此问题称为最大子模排序（MSR）。更详细地说，给定一组项目和一组非递减子模函数，其中每个函数都与预算相关联，我们的目标是找到一组项目的排名，使预算约束下所有函数实现的价值总和最大化。对于具有基数和背包型预算约束的 MSR 问题，我们提出了具有近似保证的实用算法。此外，我们进行了实证评估，证明了所提出的算法相对于强基线的优越性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在预算约束下利用子模函数进行排序的新方法，称为最大子模排序（MSR）问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管子模函数最大化在机器学习中应用广泛，但现有研究主要关注物品选择而非排序任务，而实际应用中排序需求更常见且研究不足。
AI.method: 针对容量约束和背包型预算约束，提出具有近似保证的实用算法，并通过实验证明其有效性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提算法在多个基准测试中优于现有方法，验证了其优越性。
AI.conclusion: 本文扩展了子模优化的理论框架，为预算约束下的排序问题提供了新思路和有效解决方案。

title: Self-supervised Speaker Diarization
title_zh: 自监督说话人分类
abstract: Over the last few years, deep learning has grown in popularity for speaker verification, identification, and diarization. Inarguably, a significant part of this success is due to the demonstrated effectiveness of their speaker representations. These, however, are heavily dependent on large amounts of annotated data and can be sensitive to new domains. This study proposes an entirely unsupervised deep-learning model for speaker diarization. Specifically, the study focuses on generating high-quality neural speaker representations without any annotated data, as well as on estimating secondary hyperparameters of the model without annotations. The speaker embeddings are represented by an encoder trained in a self-supervised fashion using pairs of adjacent segments assumed to be of the same speaker. The trained encoder model is then used to self-generate pseudo-labels to subsequently train a similarity score between different segments of the same call using probabilistic linear discriminant analysis (PLDA) and further to learn a clustering stopping threshold. We compared our model to state-of-the-art unsupervised as well as supervised baselines on the CallHome benchmarks. According to empirical results, our approach outperforms unsupervised methods when only two speakers are present in the call, and is only slightly worse than recent supervised models.
summary: Over the last few years, deep learning has grown in popularity for speaker verification, identification, and diarization. Inarguably, a significant part of this success is due to the demonstrated effectiveness of their speaker representations. These, however, are heavily dependent on large amounts of annotated data and can be sensitive to new domains. This study proposes an entirely unsupervised deep-learning model for speaker diarization. Specifically, the study focuses on generating high-quality neural speaker representations without any annotated data, as well as on estimating secondary hyperparameters of the model without annotations. The speaker embeddings are represented by an encoder trained in a self-supervised fashion using pairs of adjacent segments assumed to be of the same speaker. The trained encoder model is then used to self-generate pseudo-labels to subsequently train a similarity score between different segments of the same call using probabilistic linear discriminant analysis (PLDA) and further to learn a clustering stopping threshold. We compared our model to state-of-the-art unsupervised as well as supervised baselines on the CallHome benchmarks. According to empirical results, our approach outperforms unsupervised methods when only two speakers are present in the call, and is only slightly worse than recent supervised models.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，深度学习在说话人验证、身份识别和分类方面越来越受欢迎。毫无疑问，这一成功的一个重要部分是由于他们的演讲者代表所表现出的有效性。然而，这些在很大程度上依赖于大量带注释的数据，并且可能对新领域敏感。这项研究提出了一种完全无监督的深度学习模型，用于说话人分类。具体来说，该研究的重点是在没有任何注释数据的情况下生成高质量的神经说话人表示，以及在没有注释的情况下估计模型的次要超参数。说话人嵌​​入由编码器表示，该编码器使用假设为同一说话人的相邻片段对以自监督方式进行训练。然后，使用经过训练的编码器模型自行生成伪标签，随后使用概率线性判别分析 (PLDA) 训练同一调用的不同片段之间的相似性分数，并进一步学习聚类停止阈值。我们将我们的模型与 CallHome 基准上最先进的无监督和监督基线进行了比较。根据实证结果，当通话中只有两个说话者时，我们的方法优于无监督方法，并且仅比最近的监督模型稍差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需标注数据的自监督说话人分割方法，通过自监督训练编码器生成说话人表示并估计模型超参数。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习说话人分割方法依赖大量标注数据且对新领域敏感，而无监督方法在性能上存在不足。
AI.method: 使用相邻语音段自监督训练编码器生成说话人嵌入，通过伪标签结合PLDA计算相似度并学习聚类停止阈值。
AI.result: 在CallHome基准测试中，当通话包含两名说话人时优于无监督基线，仅略逊于最新监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 自监督方法在特定场景下有效，但需进一步优化以缩小与监督模型的性能差距。
